id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  chapterId   String\n  ordinal     Int\n  body        String\n  releasedAt  DateTime?\n  chapter     Chapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([chapterId, ordinal])\n}\n\nmodel Artifact {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  key         String\n  name        String\n  description String\n  safeName    String?\n  state       String   @default(\"UNKNOWN\")\n  category    String   @default(\"RELIC\")\n  discoveryText String?\n  silhouetteLabel String?\n  displayX    Float    @default(50)\n  displayY    Float    @default(50)\n  assemblyGroup String?\n  assemblyPosition String?\n  connectedArtifactKey String?\n  chapterOrdinal Int?\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  awards      ArtifactAward[]\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n}\n\nmodel ArtifactAward {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  artifactId  String\n  eventId     String?  @unique\n  awardedAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  artifact    Artifact @relation(fields: [artifactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, artifactId])\n}\n\nmodel SideQuest {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  key         String\n  title       String\n  state       String   @default(\"UNDISCOVERED\")\n  safeTeaser  String?\n  description String?\n  rewardType  String?\n  rewardLabel String?\n  completionSummary String?\n  chapterOrdinal Int?\n  mapLocationKey String?\n  artifactKey String?\n  completedAt DateTime?\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  objectives  SideQuestObjective[]\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n}\n\nmodel SideQuestObjective {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  sideQuestId String\n  ordinal     Int\n  body        String\n  complete    Boolean  @default(false)\n  sideQuest   SideQuest @relation(fields: [sideQuestId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([sideQuestId, ordinal])\n}\n\nmodel JournalEntry {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  title       String\n  body        String\n  kind        String   @default(\"ANNOTATION\")\n  eventId     String?  @unique\n  chapterOrdinal Int?\n  releasedAt  DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@index([campaignId, releasedAt])\n}\n\nmodel MapLocation {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  key         String\n  name        String\n  safeLabel   String?\n  regionLabel String\n  locationType String @default(\"STORY\")\n  state       String   @default(\"UNKNOWN\")\n  description String?\n  exactness   String   @default(\"APPROXIMATE\")\n  chapterOrdinal Int?\n  sideQuestKey String?\n  x           Float\n  y           Float\n  mobileX     Float?\n  mobileY     Float?\n  revealedAt  DateTime?\n  completedAt DateTime?\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n}\n\nmodel MapRoute {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  key         String\n  fromKey     String\n  toKey       String\n  ordinal     Int\n  state       String   @default(\"HIDDEN\")\n  annotation  String?\n  revealedAt  DateTime?\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n  @@index([campaignId, ordinal])\n}\n\nmodel ProgressEvent {\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId     String\n  type           String\n  payload        String\n  actor          String\n  sequence       Int\n  version        Int      @default(1)\n  releaseAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  reversesEventId String?\n  supersededById String?\n  campaign       Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\n  @@index([campaignId, releaseAt])\n}\n\nmodel CampaignSnapshot {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  sequence    Int\n  version     Int      @default(1)\n  state       String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\n}\n\nmodel AdminAuditLog {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  userId      String?\n  action      String\n  metadata    String\n  correlationId String?\n  outcome     String   @default(\"SUCCEEDED\")\n  reason      String?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        GameMasterUser? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)\n  @@index([campaignId, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel PreparedAction {\n  id               String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId       String\n  command          String\n  targetKey        String?\n  payload          String   @db.Text\n  status           String   @default(\"PREPARED\")\n  expectedSequence Int\n  scheduledFor     DateTime?\n  preparedBy       String\n  preparedAt       DateTime @default(now())\n  executedAt       DateTime?\n  cancelledAt      DateTime?\n  campaign         Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@index([campaignId, status, scheduledFor])\n}\n\nmodel CommandExecution {\n  id               String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId       String\n  idempotencyKey   String\n  command          String\n  expectedSequence Int\n  correlationId    String\n  status           String\n  result           String?  @db.LongText\n  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())\n  completedAt      DateTime?\n  campaign         Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, idempotencyKey])\n  @@index([campaignId, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel AudioPreference {\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n  playerAccessId String   @unique\n  muted          Boolean  @default(false)\n  masterVolume   Float    @default(0.45)\n  ambientVolume  Float    @default(0.25)\n  effectsVolume  Float    @default(0.55)\n  motionMode     String   @default(\"SYSTEM\")\n  textScale      Float    @default(1)\n  ambientEffects Boolean  @default(true)\n  textureIntensity Float  @default(1)\n  fullscreenPreferred Boolean @default(false)\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n  playerAccess   PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel ViewedContent {\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n  playerAccessId String\n  contentType    String\n  contentKey     String\n  viewedAt       DateTime @default(now())\n  playerAccess   PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([playerAccessId, contentType, contentKey])\n  @@index([playerAccessId, viewedAt])\n}\n\nmodel ContentVersion {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  key         String\n  version     Int\n  checksum    String\n  publishedAt DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  @@unique([key, version])\n}\n\nmodel SaveStateSnapshot {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  sequence    Int\n  state       String\n  reason      String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign    Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@index([campaignId, sequence])\n}\n\nmodel ViewedCeremony {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId  String\n  deviceId    String\n  eventId     String\n  viewedAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  @@unique([campaignId, deviceId, eventId])\n}\n\nmodel LoginAttempt {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  fingerprint String\n  succeeded   Boolean\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  @@index([fingerprint, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel TallTale {\n  id                       String   @id @default(cuid())\n  slug                     String   @unique\n  title                    String\n  subtitle                 String?\n  shortDescription         String?  @db.Text\n  longDescription          String?  @db.LongText\n  coverAssetId             String?\n  theme                    String   @default(\"CARTOGRAPHERS_TABLE\")\n  status                   String   @default(\"DRAFT\")\n  visibility               String   @default(\"PRIVATE\")\n  creatorId                String\n  currentDraftRevisionId   String?\n  latestPublishedVersionId String?\n  playerCountMin           Int      @default(1)\n  playerCountMax           Int      @default(4)\n  estimatedDuration        Int?\n  contentWarnings          String?  @db.Text\n  sortOrder                Int      @default(0)\n  featured                 Boolean  @default(false)\n  archivedAt               DateTime?\n  createdAt                DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt                DateTime @updatedAt\n  drafts                   TaleDraft[]\n  versions                 PublishedTaleVersion[]\n  assets                   TaleAsset[]\n  collections              TaleAssetCollection[]\n  locations                TaleLocation[]\n  storyArtifacts           TaleArtifact[]\n  sessions                 TaleSession[]\n  @@index([status, visibility, sortOrder])\n  @@index([creatorId, updatedAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleDraft {\n  id                        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId                    String\n  revisionNumber            Int      @default(1)\n  basedOnPublishedVersionId String?\n  createdBy                 String\n  autosaveVersion           Int      @default(1)\n  validationState           String   @default(\"NOT_VALIDATED\")\n  validationSummary         String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n  lastValidatedAt           DateTime?\n  createdAt                 DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt                 DateTime @updatedAt\n  tale                      TallTale @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  chapters                  TaleChapter[]\n  @@unique([taleId, revisionNumber])\n  @@index([taleId, updatedAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleChapter {\n  id                String   @id @default(cuid())\n  draftRevisionId   String\n  title             String\n  subtitle          String?\n  description       String?  @db.Text\n  orderIndex        Int\n  coverAssetId      String?\n  estimatedDuration Int?\n  entryBlockId      String?\n  completionBlockId String?\n  isOptional        Boolean  @default(false)\n  metadata          String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt\n  draft             TaleDraft @relation(fields: [draftRevisionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  blocks            StoryBlock[]\n  @@unique([draftRevisionId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([draftRevisionId])\n}\n\nmodel StoryBlock {\n  id            String   @id @default(cuid())\n  chapterId     String\n  blockType     String\n  title         String\n  internalLabel String?\n  orderIndex    Int\n  configuration String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n  presentation  String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n  completion    String   @default(\"{}\") @db.LongText\n  nextBlockId   String?\n  creatorNotes  String?  @db.Text\n  isEnabled     Boolean  @default(true)\n  schemaVersion Int      @default(1)\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n  chapter       TaleChapter @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  outgoing      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\")\n  incoming      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\")\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([chapterId, blockType])\n}\n\nmodel BlockConnection {\n  id                  String   @id @default(cuid())\n  sourceBlockId       String\n  targetBlockId       String\n  connectionType      String   @default(\"DEFAULT\")\n  conditionExpression String?  @db.Text\n  label               String?\n  orderIndex          Int      @default(0)\n  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())\n  source              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\", fields: [sourceBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  target              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\", fields: [targetBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([sourceBlockId, targetBlockId, connectionType])\n  @@index([targetBlockId])\n}\n\nmodel PublishedTaleVersion {\n  id              String   @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId          String\n  versionNumber   Int\n  versionLabel    String\n  publishedAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  publishedBy     String\n  releaseNotes    String?  @db.Text\n  contentSnapshot String   @db.LongText\n  schemaVersion   Int      @default(1)\n  checksum        String\n  isCurrent       Boolean  @default(true)\n  tale            TallTale @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sessions        TaleSession[]\n  @@unique([taleId, versionNumber])\n  @@index([taleId, isCurrent])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAsset {\n  id               String   @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId           String\n  mediaType        String\n  displayName      String\n  descripti…24 tokens truncated…String    @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId     String\n  key            String\n  name           String\n  safeLabel      String?\n  regionLabel    String\n  locationType   String    @default(\"STORY\")\n  state          String    @default(\"UNKNOWN\")\n  description    String?\n  exactness      String    @default(\"APPROXIMATE\")\n  chapterOrdinal Int?\n  sideQuestKey   String?\n  x              Float\n  y              Float\n  mobileX        Float?\n  mobileY        Float?\n  revealedAt     DateTime?\n  completedAt    DateTime?\n  campaign       Campaign  @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n}\n\nmodel MapRoute {\n  id         String    @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId String\n  key        String\n  fromKey    String\n  toKey      String\n  ordinal    Int\n  state      String    @default(\"HIDDEN\")\n  annotation String?\n  revealedAt DateTime?\n  campaign   Campaign  @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([campaignId, key])\n  @@index([campaignId, ordinal])\n}\n\nmodel ProgressEvent {\n  id              String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId      String\n  type            String\n  payload         String\n  actor           String\n  sequence        Int\n  version         Int      @default(1)\n  releaseAt       DateTime @default(now())\n  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())\n  reversesEventId String?\n  supersededById  String?\n  campaign        Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\n  @@index([campaignId, releaseAt])\n}\n\nmodel CampaignSnapshot {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId String\n  sequence   Int\n  version    Int      @default(1)\n  state      String\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign   Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([campaignId, sequence])\n}\n\nmodel AdminAuditLog {\n  id            String          @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId    String\n  userId        String?\n  action        String\n  metadata      String\n  correlationId String?\n  outcome       String          @default(\"SUCCEEDED\")\n  reason        String?\n  createdAt     DateTime        @default(now())\n  campaign      Campaign        @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user          GameMasterUser? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)\n\n  @@index([campaignId, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel PreparedAction {\n  id               String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId       String\n  command          String\n  targetKey        String?\n  payload          String\n  status           String   @default(\"PREPARED\")\n  expectedSequence Int\n  scheduledFor     DateTime?\n  preparedBy       String\n  preparedAt       DateTime @default(now())\n  executedAt       DateTime?\n  cancelledAt      DateTime?\n  campaign         Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@index([campaignId, status, scheduledFor])\n}\n\nmodel CommandExecution {\n  id               String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId       String\n  idempotencyKey   String\n  command          String\n  expectedSequence Int\n  correlationId    String\n  status           String\n  result           String?\n  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())\n  completedAt      DateTime?\n  campaign         Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([campaignId, idempotencyKey])\n  @@index([campaignId, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel AudioPreference {\n  id                  String       @id @default(cuid())\n  playerAccessId      String       @unique\n  muted               Boolean      @default(false)\n  masterVolume        Float        @default(0.45)\n  ambientVolume       Float        @default(0.25)\n  effectsVolume       Float        @default(0.55)\n  motionMode          String       @default(\"SYSTEM\")\n  textScale           Float        @default(1)\n  ambientEffects      Boolean      @default(true)\n  textureIntensity    Float        @default(1)\n  fullscreenPreferred Boolean      @default(false)\n  updatedAt           DateTime     @updatedAt\n  playerAccess        PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel ViewedContent {\n  id             String       @id @default(cuid())\n  playerAccessId String\n  contentType    String\n  contentKey     String\n  viewedAt       DateTime     @default(now())\n  playerAccess   PlayerAccess @relation(fields: [playerAccessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([playerAccessId, contentType, contentKey])\n  @@index([playerAccessId, viewedAt])\n}\n\nmodel ContentVersion {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  key         String\n  version     Int\n  checksum    String\n  publishedAt DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  @@unique([key, version])\n}\n\nmodel SaveStateSnapshot {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId String\n  sequence   Int\n  state      String\n  reason     String\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  campaign   Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([campaignId, sequence])\n}\n\nmodel ViewedCeremony {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  campaignId String\n  deviceId   String\n  eventId    String\n  viewedAt   DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@unique([campaignId, deviceId, eventId])\n}\n\nmodel LoginAttempt {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  fingerprint String\n  succeeded   Boolean\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@index([fingerprint, createdAt])\n}\n\n// Tall Tale Studio is deliberately additive. The original Campaign models above\n// continue to power the existing Forever Treasure experience while authored tales\n// use an immutable publish-and-session model.\nmodel TallTale {\n  id                       String                 @id @default(cuid())\n  slug                     String                 @unique\n  title                    String\n  subtitle                 String?\n  shortDescription         String?\n  longDescription          String?\n  coverAssetId             String?\n  theme                    String                 @default(\"CARTOGRAPHERS_TABLE\")\n  status                   String                 @default(\"DRAFT\")\n  visibility               String                 @default(\"PRIVATE\")\n  creatorId                String\n  currentDraftRevisionId   String?\n  latestPublishedVersionId String?\n  playerCountMin           Int                    @default(1)\n  playerCountMax           Int                    @default(4)\n  estimatedDuration        Int?\n  contentWarnings          String?\n  sortOrder                Int                    @default(0)\n  featured                 Boolean                @default(false)\n  archivedAt               DateTime?\n  createdAt                DateTime               @default(now())\n  updatedAt                DateTime               @updatedAt\n  drafts                   TaleDraft[]\n  versions                 PublishedTaleVersion[]\n  assets                   TaleAsset[]\n  collections              TaleAssetCollection[]\n  locations                TaleLocation[]\n  storyArtifacts           TaleArtifact[]\n  sessions                 TaleSession[]\n\n  @@index([status, visibility, sortOrder])\n  @@index([creatorId, updatedAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleDraft {\n  id                        String        @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId                    String\n  revisionNumber            Int           @default(1)\n  basedOnPublishedVersionId String?\n  createdBy                 String\n  autosaveVersion           Int           @default(1)\n  validationState           String        @default(\"NOT_VALIDATED\")\n  validationSummary         String        @default(\"{}\")\n  lastValidatedAt           DateTime?\n  createdAt                 DateTime      @default(now())\n  updatedAt                 DateTime      @updatedAt\n  tale                      TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  chapters                  TaleChapter[]\n\n  @@unique([taleId, revisionNumber])\n  @@index([taleId, updatedAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleChapter {\n  id                String       @id @default(cuid())\n  draftRevisionId   String\n  title             String\n  subtitle          String?\n  description       String?\n  orderIndex        Int\n  coverAssetId      String?\n  estimatedDuration Int?\n  entryBlockId      String?\n  completionBlockId String?\n  isOptional        Boolean      @default(false)\n  metadata          String       @default(\"{}\")\n  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt\n  draft             TaleDraft    @relation(fields: [draftRevisionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  blocks            StoryBlock[]\n\n  @@unique([draftRevisionId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([draftRevisionId])\n}\n\nmodel StoryBlock {\n  id            String            @id @default(cuid())\n  chapterId     String\n  blockType     String\n  title         String\n  internalLabel String?\n  orderIndex    Int\n  configuration String            @default(\"{}\")\n  presentation  String            @default(\"{}\")\n  completion    String            @default(\"{}\")\n  nextBlockId   String?\n  creatorNotes  String?\n  isEnabled     Boolean           @default(true)\n  schemaVersion Int               @default(1)\n  createdAt     DateTime          @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime          @updatedAt\n  chapter       TaleChapter       @relation(fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  outgoing      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\")\n  incoming      BlockConnection[] @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\")\n\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([chapterId, blockType])\n}\n\nmodel BlockConnection {\n  id                  String     @id @default(cuid())\n  sourceBlockId       String\n  targetBlockId       String\n  connectionType      String     @default(\"DEFAULT\")\n  conditionExpression String?\n  label               String?\n  orderIndex          Int        @default(0)\n  createdAt           DateTime   @default(now())\n  source              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionSource\", fields: [sourceBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  target              StoryBlock @relation(\"BlockConnectionTarget\", fields: [targetBlockId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([sourceBlockId, targetBlockId, connectionType])\n  @@index([targetBlockId])\n}\n\nmodel PublishedTaleVersion {\n  id              String        @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId          String\n  versionNumber   Int\n  versionLabel    String\n  publishedAt     DateTime      @default(now())\n  publishedBy     String\n  releaseNotes    String?\n  contentSnapshot String\n  schemaVersion   Int           @default(1)\n  checksum        String\n  isCurrent       Boolean       @default(true)\n  tale            TallTale      @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sessions        TaleSession[]\n\n  @@unique([taleId, versionNumber])\n  @@index([taleId, isCurrent])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAsset {\n  id               String                    @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId           String\n  mediaType        String\n  displayName      String\n  description      String?\n  originalFilename String\n  currentVariantId String?\n  mimeType         String\n  fileSize         Int\n  width            Int?\n  height           Int?\n  duration         Float?\n  checksum         String\n  createdBy        String\n  createdAt        DateTime                  @default(now())\n  updatedAt        DateTime                  @updatedAt\n  deletedAt        DateTime?\n  tale             TallTale                  @relation(fields: [taleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  variants         TaleAssetVariant[]\n  tags             TaleAssetTagLink[]\n  roles            TaleAssetRole[]\n  collectionItems  TaleAssetCollectionItem[]\n\n  @@unique([taleId, checksum])\n  @@index([taleId, mediaType, deletedAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAssetVariant {\n  id              String    @id @default(cuid())\n  assetId         String\n  role            String\n  storageKey      String    @unique\n  mimeType        String\n  fileSize        Int\n  width           Int?\n  height          Int?\n  duration        Float?\n  checksum        String\n  processingState String    @default(\"READY\")\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\n  asset           TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([assetId, role, createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAssetTag {\n  id        String             @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId    String\n  name      String\n  createdAt DateTime           @default(now())\n  assets    TaleAssetTagLink[]\n\n  @@unique([taleId, name])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAssetTagLink {\n  assetId String\n  tagId   String\n  asset   TaleAsset    @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  tag     TaleAssetTag @relation(fields: [tagId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@id([assetId, tagId])\n  @@index([tagId])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAssetRole {\n  id        String    @id @default(cuid())\n  assetId   String\n  role      String\n  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())\n  asset     TaleAsset @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([assetId, role])\n}\n\nmodel TaleAssetCollection {\n  id             String                    @id @default(cuid())\n  taleId         String\n  name           String\n  description    String?\n  collectionType \"next/headers\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PLAYER_COOKIE = \"forever_player\";\nconst GM_COOKIE = \"forever_gm\";\nconst sessionAge = 1000 * 60 * 60 * 10;\n\nexport const hashToken = (value: string) => createHash(\"sha256\").update(value).digest(\"hex\");\nexport const makeToken = (bytes = 32) => randomBytes(bytes).toString(\"base64url\");\nexport function safeEqual(a: string, b: string) {\n  const left = Buffer.from(a);\n  const right = Buffer.from(b);\n  return left.length === right.length && timingSafeEqual(left, right);\n}\n\nexport async function setPlayerSession(playerAccessId: string) {\n  const jar = await cookies();\n  jar.set(PLAYER_COOKIE, playerAccessId, {\n    httpOnly: true,\n    sameSite: \"strict\",\n    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    path: \"/\",\n    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30,\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function requirePlayer(campaignSlug: string) {\n  const jar = await cookies();\n  const id = jar.get(PLAYER_COOKIE)?.value;\n  if (!id) return null;\n  return db.playerAccess.findFirst({\n    where: { id, campaign: { slug: campaignSlug }, OR: [{ expiresAt: null }, { expiresAt: { gt: new Date() } }] },\n    include: { campaign: true },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function createGmSession(userId: string) {\n  const id = makeToken();\n  const csrfToken = makeToken(24);\n  await db.gameMasterSession.create({\n    data: { id: hashToken(id), userId, csrfToken, expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + sessionAge) },\n  });\n  const jar = await cookies();\n  jar.set(GM_COOKIE, id, {\n    httpOnly: true,\n    sameSite: \"strict\",\n    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    path: \"/\",\n    maxAge: sessionAge / 1000,\n  });\n  return csrfToken;\n}\n\nexport async function requireGm() {\n  const raw = (await cookies()).get(GM_COOKIE)?.value;\n  if (!raw) return null;\n  return db.gameMasterSession.findFirst({\n    where: { id: hashToken(raw), expiresAt: { gt: new Date() } },\n    include: { user: true },\n  });\n}\n\nexport type GmCapability = \"CAPTAIN\" | \"CREATE_TALES\" | \"PUBLISH_TALES\" | \"MANAGE_ASSETS\";\n\nconst roleCapabilities: Record<string, GmCapability[]> = {\n  CAPTAIN: [\"CAPTAIN\"],\n  CREATOR: [\"CREATE_TALES\", \"MANAGE_ASSETS\"],\n  PUBLISHER: [\"CREATE_TALES\", \"PUBLISH_TALES\", \"MANAGE_ASSETS\"],\n  CAPTAIN_CREATOR: [\"CAPTAIN\", \"CREATE_TALES\", \"PUBLISH_TALES\", \"MANAGE_ASSETS\"],\n};\n\nexport function gmCan(user: { role: string; capabilities: string }, capability: GmCapability) {\n  let explicit: string[] = [];\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(user.capabilities);\n    if (Array.isArray(parsed)) explicit = parsed.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === \"string\");\n  } catch {}\n  return roleCapabilities[user.role]?.includes(capability) || explicit.includes(capability);\n}\n\nexport async function requireGmCapability(capability: GmCapability) {\n  const session = await requireGm();\n  return session && gmCan(session.user, capability) ? session : null;\n}\n\nexport async function verifyCsrf(session: { csrfToken: string }) {\n  const provided = (await headers()).get(\"x-csrf-token\") ?? \"\";\n  return safeEqual(provided, session.csrfToken);\n}\n\nexport async function clearGmSession() {\n  const jar = await cookies();\n  const raw = jar.get(GM_COOKIE)?.value;\n  if (raw) await db.gameMasterSession.deleteMany({ where: { id: hashToken(raw) } });\n  jar.delete(GM_COOKIE);\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

NextResponse.json({ error: \"The Captain session expired.\" }, { status: 403 });\n  try {\n    const rate = consumeRateLimit(`tale-captain:${session.userId}`, { limit: 60, windowMs: 60_000 });\n    if (!rate.allowed)\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many Captain actions. Wait a moment before trying again.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rate) },\n      );\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      await captainSessionAction((await context.params).sessionId, session.userId, await request.json()),\n    );\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n\ntype Session = {\n  id: string;\n  taleId: string;\n  taleTitle: string;\n  versionLabel: string;\n  ownerLabel: string | null;\n  status: string;\n  previewMode: boolean;\n  currentBlockId: string | null;\n  pendingVerification: { providerType: string; requestedAt: string } | null;\n  lastEventAt: string;\n  connected: boolean;\n};\ntype Tale = { id: string; slug: string; title: string; status: string; visibility: string };\n\nexport function CaptainDashboard({ authenticated, taleFilter }: { authenticated: boolean; taleFilter?: string }) {\n  const [sessions, setSessions] = useState<Session[]>([]);\n  const [tales, setTales] = useState<Tale[]>([]);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [clock, setClock] = useState(0);\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/captain/sessions\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { sessions?: Session[]; tales?: Tale[]; error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The Captain ledger is unavailable.\");\n    else {\n      setSessions(body.sessions ?? []);\n      setTales(body.tales ?? []);\n      setError(\"\");\n    }\n  }, []);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authenticated) return;\n    queueMicrotask(() => {\n      setClock(Date.now());\n      void load();\n    });\n    const timer = setInterval(() => {\n      setClock(Date.now());\n      void load();\n    }, 2500);\n    return () => clearInterval(timer);\n  }, [authenticated, load]);\n  const shown = useMemo(\n    () => (taleFilter ? sessions.filter((session) => session.taleId === taleFilter) : sessions),\n    [sessions, taleFilter],\n  );\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"captain-auth\">\n        <section>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Captain control</p>\n          <h1>The command cabin is locked.</h1>\n          <p>Sign in through the Quartermaster&apos;s Log, then return to active Tall Tale sessions.</p>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">\n            Open Quartermaster login\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"captain-dashboard\">\n      <header>\n        <div>\n          <Link href=\"/\">â† Harbor</Link>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Authoritative session control</p>\n          <h1>Captain&apos;s Tall Tale Desk</h1>\n          <p>State refreshes from the server every 2.5 seconds. Progression actions remain idempotent and audited.</p>\n        </div>\n        <nav>\n          <Link href=\"/studio\">Tall Tale Studio</Link>\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Player catalog</Link>\n        </nav>\n      </header>\n      {error && (\n        <p role=\"alert\" className=\"captain-error\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n      )}\n      <section className=\"captain-summary\">\n        <article>\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.status === \"ACTIVE\" && !session.previewMode).length}</strong>\n          <span>active voyages</span>\n        </article>\n        <article>\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.pendingVerification && !session.previewMode).length}</strong>\n          <span>awaiting verification</span>\n        </article>\n        <article>\n          <strong>{shown.filter((session) => session.previewMode).length}</strong>\n          <span>preview sessions</span>\n        </article>\n        <article className=\"live-poll\">\n          <i />\n          <strong>Live</strong>\n          <span>canonical polling</span>\n        </article>\n      </section>\n      <div className=\"captain-layout\">\n        <aside>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Available Tall Tales</p>\n          {tales.map((tale) => (\n            <Link className={tale.id === taleFilter ? \"active\" : \"\"} key={tale.id} href={`/captain/tales/${tale.id}`}>\n              <strong>{tale.title}</strong>\n              <span>\n                {tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â· {tale.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}\n              </span>\n            </Link>\n          ))}\n        </aside>\n        <section className=\"captain-sessions\">\n          <header>\n            <h2>{taleFilter ? tales.find((tale) => tale.id === taleFilter)?.title : \"All sessions\"}</h2>\n            <span>{shown.length} total</span>\n          </header>\n          {!shown.length && (\n            <div className=\"captain-empty\">\n              <span>â—Œ</span>\n              <h3>No sessions on this chart</h3>\n              <p>Start a published tale or create a Studio preview session.</p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          {shown\n            .filter((session) => !session.previewMode)\n            .map((session) => (\n              <SessionCard key={session.id} session={session} clock={clock} />\n            ))}\n          {shown.some((session) => session.previewMode) && (\n            <>\n              <h3 className=\"preview-divider\">Development previews</h3>\n              {shown\n                .filter((session) => session.previewMode)\n                .map((session) => (\n                  <SessionCard key={session.id} session={session} clock={clock} />\n                ))}\n            </>\n          )}\n        </section>\n      </div>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SessionCard({ session, clock }: { session: Session; clock: number }) {\n  const waiting = session.pendingVerification\n    ? Math.max(0, clock - Date.parse(session.pendingVerification.requestedAt))\n    : 0;\n  return (\n    <article\n      className={`captain-session-card ${session.pendingVerification ? \"waiting\" : \"\"} ${session.previewMode ? \"preview\" : \"\"}`}\n    >\n      <div className=\"session-signal\">\n        <i className={session.connected ? \"connected\" : \"quiet\"} />\n        <span>{session.connected ? \"Recent player heartbeat\" : \"No recent player heartbeat\"}</span>\n      </div>\n      <p className=\"card-kicker\">{session.previewMode ? \"Preview Mode\" : `Version ${session.versionLabel}`}</p>\n      <h3>{session.taleTitle}</h3>\n      <p>{session.ownerLabel ?? \"Guest crew\"}</p>\n      <dl>\n        <div>\n          <dt>Status</dt>\n          <dd>{session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <dt>Current block</dt>\n          <dd>{session.currentBlockId?.slice(0, 8) ?? \"none\"}</dd>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <dt>Verification</dt>\n          <dd>\n            {session.pendingVerification\n              ? `${session.pendingVerification.providerType} Â· ${Math.floor(waiting / 1000)}s`\n              : \"none pending\"}\n          </dd>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <dt>Last event</dt>\n          <dd>{new Date(session.lastEventAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</dd>\n        </div>\n      </dl>\n      <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/captain/sessions/${session.id}`}>\n        Open session controls\n      </Link>\n    </article>\n  );\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport type { JsonObject } from \"@/tall-tale/types\";\n\ntype State = {\n  session: {\n    id: string;\n    status: string;\n    previewMode: boolean;\n    versionId: string;\n    ownerLabel: string | null;\n    currentSequence: number;\n    updatedAt: string;\n  };\n  tale: { title: string };\n  chapter: { title: string } | null;\n  block: {\n    id: string;\n    title: string;\n    blockType: string;\n    configuration: JsonObject;\n    creatorNotes: string | null;\n  } | null;\n  pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string; requestedAt: string } | null;\n  inventory: string[];\n  variables?: JsonObject;\n  events: Array<{\n    id: string;\n    eventType: string;\n    sourceType: string;\n    sequence: number;\n    payload: JsonObject;\n    createdAt: string;\n  }>;\n  chapters?: Array<{ id: string; title: string; blocks: Array<{ id: string; title: string; blockType: string }> }>;\n};\n\nexport function CaptainSessionControl({ sessionId, authenticated }: { sessionId: string; authenticated: boolean }) {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<State | null>(null);\n  const [csrf, setCsrf] = useState(\"\");\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [jumpTarget, setJumpTarget] = useState(\"\");\n  const [simResult, setSimResult] = useState(\"match\");\n  const [confidence, setConfidence] = useState(0.95);\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\n    const [detail, list] = await Promise.all([\n      fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" }),\n      fetch(\"/api/captain/sessions\", { cache: \"no-store\" }),\n    ]);\n    const body = (await detail.json()) as State & { error?: string };\n    const meta = (await list.json()) as { csrfToken?: string };\n    if (!detail.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Session detail is unavailable.\");\n    else {\n      setState(body);\n      setError(\"\");\n    }\n    setCsrf(meta.csrfToken ?? \"\");\n  }, [sessionId]);\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authenticated) return;\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\n    const timer = setInterval(() => void load(), 2000);\n    return () => clearInterval(timer);\n  }, [authenticated, load]);\n  async function action(name: string, options: JsonObject = {}) {\n    if (\n      [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\"].includes(name) &&\n      !window.confirm(`${name} changes canonical progression and will be written to the audit history. Continue?`)\n    )\n      return;\n    const reason = [\"rollback\", \"jump\", \"override\", \"reject\"].includes(name)\n      ? window.prompt(\"Record a reason for this Captain action:\")\n      : \"Captain control\";\n    if (reason === null) return;\n    setBusy(true);\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action: name, reason, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), ...options }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Captain action failed.\");\n    await load();\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  async function simulate(scenario = \"valid\") {\n    setBusy(true);\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}/simulate`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ result: simResult, confidence, scenario }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; code?: string };\n    setError(\n      response.ok\n        ? `Simulator accepted the ${simResult} event${scenario === \"duplicate\" ? \" and safely deduplicated its replay\" : \"\"}.`\n        : `${body.error ?? \"Simulator event rejected.\"} (${body.code ?? \"rejected\"})`,\n    );\n    await load();\n    setBusy(false);\n  }\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"captain-auth\">\n        <section>\n          <h1>Captain authentication required</h1>\n          <Link href=\"/quartermaster\">Open Quartermaster login</Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!state)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"captain-session loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Opening the audited session ledgerâ€¦\"}</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"captain-session\">\n      <header>\n        <div>\n          <Link href=\"/captain\">â† All sessions</Link>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview session\" : `Pinned ${state.session.versionId.slice(0, 12)}`}\n          </p>\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\n          <p>\n            {state.session.ownerLabel} Â· {state.session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â· sequence{\" \"}\n            {state.session.currentSequence}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        <span className=\"polling-state\">\n          <i />\n          Canonical state Â· 2s polling\n        </span>\n      </header>\n      {error && (\n        <div className=\"captain-notice\" role=\"status\">\n          <span>{error}</span>\n          <button onClick={() => setError(\"\")}>Dismiss</button>\n        </div>\n      )}\n      <div className=\"session-control-grid\">\n        <section className=\"current-state\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Player&apos;s present position</p>\n          <h2>{state.chapter?.title}</h2>\n          <h3>{state.block?.title}</h3>\n          <span>{state.block?.blockType}</span>\n          <p>\n            {String(\n              state.block?.configuration.prompt ??\n                state.block?.configuration.heading ??\n                state.block?.configuration.body ??\n                \"No player summary configured.\",\n            )}\n          </p>\n          {state.block?.creatorNotes && (\n            <aside>\n              <strong>Private creator note</strong>\n              <p>{state.block.creatorNotes}</p>\n            </aside>\n          )}\n          <div className={`pending-request ${state.pendingVerification ? \"active\" : \"quiet\"}`}>\n            <strong>\n              {state.pendingVerification\n                ? `Pending ${state.pendingVerification.providerType}`\n                : \"No pending verification\"}\n            </strong>\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\n              <span>Waiting since {new Date(state.pendingVerification.requestedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"captain-actions\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Authorized controls</p>\n          <div>\n            {state.pendingVerification && (\n              <>\n                <button className=\"approve\" disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"approve\")}>\n                  Approve verification\n                </button>\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"reject\")}>\n                  Reject / request retry\n                </button>\n                <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"override\")}>\n                  Explicit override\n                </button>\n              </>\n            )}\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"resume\" : \"pause\")}>\n              {state.session.status === \"PAUSED\" ? \"Resume\" : \"Pause\"} session\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"presentation\")}>\n              Re-trigger presentation\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"releaseHint\")}>\n              Release hint\n            </button>\n            <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void action(\"rollback\")}>\n              Rollback to prior safe block\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <label>\n            <span>Jump target</span>\n            <select value={jumpTarget} onChange={(event) => setJumpTarget(event.target.value)}>\n              <option value=\"\">Choose block</option>\n              {state.chapters?.map((chapter) => (\n                <optgroup key={chapter.id} label={chapter.title}>\n                  {chapter.blocks.map((block) => (\n                    <option key={block.id} value={block.id}>\n                      {block.title} Â· {block.blockType}\n                    </option>\n                  ))}\n                </optgroup>\n              ))}\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <button disabled={busy || !jumpTarget} onClick={() => void action(\"jump\", { targetBlockId: jumpTarget })}>\n            Jump with audit reason\n          </button>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"session-debug\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Inventory and variables</p>\n          <h3>Inventory</h3>\n          <ul>{state.inventory.length ? state.inventory.map((item) => <li key={item}>{item}</li>) : <li>Empty</li>}</ul>\n          <h3>Variables</h3>\n          <pre>{JSON.stringify(state.variables ?? {}, null, 2)}</pre>\n        </section>\n        <section className=\"event-ledger\">\n          <p className=\"card-kicker\">Recent event history</p>\n          <ol>\n            {state.events.map((event) => (\n              <li key={event.id}>\n                <span>{event.sequence}</span>\n                <div>\n                  <strong>{event.eventType}</strong>\n                  <small>\n                    {event.sourceType} Â· {new Date(event.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()}\n                  </small>\n                </div>\n              </li>\n            ))}\n          </ol>\n        </section>\n        {process.env.NODE_ENV !== \"production\" && (\n          <section className=\"verification-simulator\">\n            <p className=\"card-kicker\">Development tool Â· future provider seam</p>\n            <h2>Verification Simulator</h2>\n            <p>\n              Submits standardized evidence against the current pending request. It cannot issue an unrestricted advance\n              command.\n            </p>\n            <label>\n              <span>Outcome</span>\n              <select value={simResult} onChange={(event) => setSimResult(event.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"match\">Match</option>\n                <option value=\"notMatch\">Not match</option>\n                <option value=\"uncertain\">Uncertain</option>\n              </select>\n            </label>\n            <label>\n              <span>Confidence {confidence.toFixed(2)}</span>\n              <input\n                type=\"range\"\n                min={0}\n                max={1}\n                step={0.01}\n                value={confidence}\n                onChange={(event) => setConfidence(Number(event.target.value))}\n              />\n            </label>\n            <div>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate()}>\n                Submit simulated outcome\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"duplicate\")}>\n                Test duplicate\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"stale\")}>\n                Test stale\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongBlock\")}>\n                Test wrong block\n              </button>\n              <button disabled={busy || !state.pendingVerification} onClick={() => void simulate(\"wrongVersion\")}>\n                Test wrong version\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

string) => `${label}-${crypto.randomUUID()}`;\n\nasync function current(request: APIRequestContext, sessionId: string) {\n  const response = await request.get(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`);\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  return response.json() as Promise<{\n    session: { status: string; versionId: string };\n    block: { id: string; blockType: string; title: string } | null;\n    pendingVerification: { id: string; providerType: string } | null;\n    inventory: string[];\n  }>;\n}\n\nasync function dragLibraryBlock(page: Page, name: string) {\n  const source = page.locator(\".block-library article\").filter({ has: page.getByText(name, { exact: true }) });\n  const target = page.locator(\".timeline-drop\").last();\n  await target.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded();\n  await source.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded();\n  const [sourceBox, targetBox] = await Promise.all([source.boundingBox(), target.boundingBox()]);\n  expect(sourceBox).toBeTruthy();\n  expect(targetBox).toBeTruthy();\n  const before = await page.locator(\".timeline-block\").count();\n  await page.mouse.move(sourceBox!.x + sourceBox!.width / 2, sourceBox!.y + sourceBox!.height / 2);\n  await page.mouse.down();\n  await page.mouse.move(targetBox!.x + targetBox!.width / 2, targetBox!.y + targetBox!.height / 2, { steps: 12 });\n  await page.mouse.up();\n  await expect(page.locator(\".timeline-block\")).toHaveCount(before + 1);\n}\n\ntest(\"published Studio tale completes through player, Captain, and helper contracts\", async ({ browser }) => {\n  const playerContext = await browser.newContext();\n  const captainContext = await browser.newContext();\n  const strangerContext = await browser.newContext();\n  const player = playerContext.request;\n  const captain = captainContext.request;\n\n  const catalogResponse = await player.get(\"/api/tales\");\n  expect(catalogResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  const catalog = (await catalogResponse.json()) as {\n    tales: Array<{ slug: string; title: string; version: string }>;\n  };\n  expect(catalog.tales).toContainEqual(expect.objectContaining({ slug: \"development-studio-voyage\", version: \"1.0\" }));\n\n  const startResponse = await player.post(\"/api/tales/development-studio-voyage/start\", {\n    data: { ownerLabel: \"Playwright Crew\" },\n  });\n  expect(startResponse.status()).toBe(201);\n  const started = (await startResponse.json()) as { sessionId: string };\n  const sessionId = started.sessionId;\n  expect((await strangerContext.request.get(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`)).status()).toBe(401);\n\n  let state = await current(player, sessionId);\n  const pinnedVersionId = state.session.versionId;\n  expect(state.block).toMatchObject({ blockType: \"narrative\", title: \"The Lantern Wakes\" });\n\n  let response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n    data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"narrative\") },\n  });\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n  expect(state.pendingVerification?.providerType).toBe(\"textAnswer\");\n\n  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n    data: { action: \"answer\", answer: \"anchor\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"wrong-answer\") },\n  });\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect((await response.json()).accepted).toBe(false);\n  expect((await current(player, sessionId)).block?.blockType).toBe(\"riddle\");\n\n  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n    data: { action: \"answer\", answer: \"  LANTERN  \", idempotencyKey: unique(\"right-answer\") },\n  });\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n  expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(\"captainApproval\");\n  expect(state.pendingVerification?.providerType).toBe(\"captainManual\");\n\n  const loginResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n    data: { username: process.env.GM_USERNAME, [REDACTED: SECRET ASSIGNMENT] },\n  });\n  expect(loginResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  const { csrfToken } = (await loginResponse.json()) as { csrfToken: string };\n\n  const pairResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/helper/pair\", {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrfToken },\n    data: { sessionId, deviceId: \"playwright-helper\" },\n  });\n  expect(pairResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  const { token, pairingId } = (await pairResponse.json()) as { token: string; pairingId: string };\n  const helperStatus = await captain.get(\"/api/helper/status\", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } });\n  expect(helperStatus.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect(await helperStatus.json()).toMatchObject({\n    pairing: { id: pairingId, status: \"ACTIVE\" },\n    scope: { sessionId, publishedVersionId: pinnedVersionId, currentBlockId: state.block!.id },\n  });\n  const pending = state.pendingVerification!;\n  const wrongVersionResponse = await captain.post(\"/api/helper/verification\", {\n    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },\n    data: {\n      schemaVersion: 1,\n      eventId: unique(\"helper-event\"),\n      idempotencyKey: unique(\"helper-idempotency\"),\n      eventType: \"verification.observation\",\n      providerType: \"captainManual\",\n      providerInstanceId: \"playwright-helper\",\n      sessionId,\n      publishedVersionId: `${pinnedVersionId}-wrong`,\n      blockId: state.block!.id,\n      verificationRequestId: pending.id,\n      observedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n      result: \"match\",\n      confidence: 0.99,\n      evidence: { test: true },\n    },\n  });\n  expect(wrongVersionResponse.status()).toBe(409);\n  expect((await wrongVersionResponse.json()).code).toBe(\"wrongVersion\");\n\n  const approval = await captain.post(`/api/captain/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrfToken },\n    data: { action: \"approve\", reason: \"Playwright golden path\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"captain-approve\") },\n  });\n  expect(approval.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n  expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(\"chapterComplete\");\n  expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n\n  const revoke = await captain.delete(`/api/helper/pair/${pairingId}`, {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": csrfToken },\n  });\n  expect(revoke.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect((await captain.get(\"/api/helper/status\", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } })).status()).toBe(\n    409,\n  );\n\n  for (const expectedType of [\"travelDirection\", \"confirmation\", \"taleComplete\"]) {\n    response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n      data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(`continue-${expectedType}`) },\n    });\n    expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n    state = await current(player, sessionId);\n    expect(state.block?.blockType).toBe(expectedType);\n    expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n  }\n  response = await player.post(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\n    data: { action: \"continue\", idempotencyKey: unique(\"complete-tale\") },\n  });\n  expect(response.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  state = await current(player, sessionId);\n  expect(state.session.status).toBe(\"COMPLETED\");\n  expect(state.session.versionId).toBe(pinnedVersionId);\n  const completedCatalog = (await (await player.get(\"/api/tales\")).json()) as {\n    tales: Array<{ slug: string; playerState: string; sessionId: string | null }>;\n  };\n  expect(completedCatalog.tales).toContainEqual(\n    expect.objectContaining({ slug: \"development-studio-voyage\", playerState: \"COMPLETED\", sessionId }),\n  );\n\n  await playerContext.close();\n  await captainContext.close();\n  await strangerContext.close();\n});\n\ntest(\"Studio editor exposes searchable authoring tools and responsive isolated preview\", async ({ page }) => {\n  const login = await page.request.post(\"/api/gm/login\", {\n    data: { username: process.env.GM_USERNAME, [REDACTED: SECRET ASSIGNMENT] },\n  });\n expect(studioResponse.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  const studio = (await studioResponse.json()) as { tales: Array<{ id: string; slug: string }> };\n  const tale = studio.tales.find((item) => item.slug === \"development-studio-voyage\");\n  expect(tale).toBeTruthy();\n\n  await page.goto(`/studio/tales/${tale!.id}`);\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"tab\", { name: \"Blocks\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"tab\", { name: \"Chapters\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"tab\", { name: \"Outline\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"searchbox\", { );\n  await page.locator(\".timeline-block\").first().click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Preview Block\" })).toBeEnabled();\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Preview Block\" }).click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"dialog\", { name: \"The Lantern Wakes\" })).toBeVisible();\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Mobile\" }).click();\n  await page.getByLabel(\"Reduced motion\").check();\n  await expect(page.locator(\".block-preview-viewport.mobile.reduced-motion\")).toBeVisible();\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Close block preview\" }).click();\n\n  await page.setViewportSize({ width: 390, height: 844 });\n  await page.locator(\".timeline-block\").first().click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: expect(page.locator(\".block-inspector.empty\")).toBeHidden();\n\n  const detail = (await (await page.request.get(`/api/studio/tales/${tale!.id}`)).json()) as {\n    versions: Array<{ id: string; versionLabel: string }>;\n  };\n  const version = detail.versions[0];\n  const publishedPreview = await page.request.post(`/api/studio/tales/${tale!.id}/versions/${version.id}`, {\n    headers: { });\n  await page.goto(\"/play/development-studio-voyage/history\");\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"Preview voyages are not recorded\" })).toBeVisible();\n  const restored = expect(restored.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect(await restored.json()).toMatchObject({ basedOnPublishedVersionId: version.id, revisionNumber: 2 });\n});\n\ntest(\"creator authors, aligns, publishes, [{"text": "Script completed\nWall time 0.3 seconds\nOutput:\n", "type": "input_text"}, {"text": "Warning: truncated output (original token count: 10024)\nTotal output lines: 697\n\nExit code: 0\nWall time: 0.3 seconds\nTotal output lines: 803\nOutput:\n# Tall Tale Studio Phase 1\n\n## Delivered workflow\n\nTall Tale Studio is an additive authoring and play system. It does not replace the original single-campaign companion.\n\n- `/studio` lists drafts, validation state, release state, assets, and sessions.\n- `/studio/tales/new` creates a private tale and first chapter.\n- `/studio/tales/[id]` edits a vertical story graph with optimistic autosave, undo/redo, dnd-kit pointer/keyboard sorting, and explicit add/move controls.\n- Settings, assets, locations, artifacts, and version history have dedicated nested routes.\n- `/tales` is the dynamic public catalog. `/play/[taleSlug]` starts a version-pinned session.\n- `/captain` lists live sessions; `/captain/sessions/[id]` controls progression and exposes the development verification simulator.\n\nCreator and publisher operations require a server-side GM session, explicit capabilities, and CSRF. Player access tokens are random, stored only as hashes, and retained in a strict HTTP-only browser cookie rather than the session URL. Media storage keys are opaque and validated before filesystem access.\n\nThe editor includes searchable Block Library, Chapters, and Story Outline tabs; collapsible chapters; visible flow/drop indicators; and responsive inspector behavior. A selected block can be rendered in an isolated desktop or mobile viewport with reduced-motion and replay controls, while Full Tale Preview and Play From Here use expiring draft sessions. The More menu exposes settings, version history, duplicate, and guarded archive actions.\n\n## Authoring model\n\nThe registry in `src/tall-tale/block-registry.ts` is the source of truth for all Phase 1 blocks:\n\n1. Narrative\n2. Captain's Note\n3. Riddle\n4. Information\n5. Travel Direction\n6. Location\n7. Arrival Check\n8. Image\n9. Image Transformation\n10. Cinematic\n11. Audio\n12. Artifact Reveal\n13. Hidden Message Reveal\n14. Collection Update\n15. Confirmation\n16. Choice\n17. Text Answer\n18. Captain Approval\n19. Wait\n20. Condition\n21. Set Variable\n22. Chapter Complete\n23. Tale Complete\n\nEach entry owns a stable type ID, category, defaults, inspector metadata, Zod configuration schema, asset-field declarations, and verification-provider dispatch. Unknown types render a safe diagnostic card and do not execute arbitrary behavior.\n\nThe editor sends the complete normalized draft with its `autosaveVersion`. The server claims that exact token before replacing chapter and block rows. A stale browser receives `DRAFT_CONFLICT`; its local state is not discarded. Choice and condition targets become explicit `BlockConnection` records. Duplication assigns new chapter/block IDs and remaps branch targets.\n\n## Publishing and sessions\n\nPublishing runs server-side graph, configuration, asset, and reachability validation. Blocking errors prevent a release; warnings remain visible. A successful publish serializes tale metadata, chapters, blocks, connections, locations, artifacts, and exact asset variants into a checksummed immutable snapshot. The transaction advances `latestPublishedVersionId` and marks the previous release non-current.\n\nThe catalog lists only current public releases; current unlisted releases remain available by their direct address. Starting a game records the exact `publishedVersionId`; later releases cannot alter that session. Preview sessions instead carry a draft snapshot and are visibly labeled. Every session event has a monotonic sequence and globally unique idempotency key.\n\nVersion History can preview any immutable release or copy it into a newly numbered draft based on that release without mutating the published snapshot or discarding the prior draft. The catalog reports New, In Progress, or Completed/Replayable for the authenticated browser session and routes its primary action to Start, Continue, or Replay accordingly.\n\nThe progression engine advances automatic blocks, evaluates variables/conditions, grants artifacts once, and opens standardized verification requests. Text answers, player confirmations, timers, Captain decisions, helper submissions, and the simulator converge on that engine. It rejects duplicate, stale, wrong-session, wrong-version, wrong-block, and wrong-request submissions.\n\n## Assets and reusable libraries\n\nUploads validate MIME allowlists, size, and magic bytes. Originals are retained; images receive WebP thumbnail, preview, optimized, and mobile derivatives with checksums. Duplicate content returns the existing logical asset. Replacement adds new variants to the same asset ID, preserving existing draft references and older version snapshots. Published media requests are restricted to variants captured by that version.\n\nAssets support display metadata, tags, semantic roles, collections, search/filtering by media/context/role/tag/collection/usage, recent and unused views, lazy thumbnails, paged expansion, drag-to-field assignment, usage lookup, original download, replacement, and guarded archive. A local `TaleAssetStorage` implementation isolates storage operations behind a replaceable interface. Locations support searchable/sortable records, duplicate/edit/archive, used-by counts, player copy, private Captain notes, map/display assets, a reference collection, and a future verification profile. Artifacts provide the parallel searchable/duplicable workflow for lore, ordinary-object labels, artwork/reveal/model assets, inventory categories, and persistence.\n\nInteractive player, Captain, upload, and helper routes apply bounded per-process rate limits in addition to authorization, CSRF, idempotency, and optimistic concurrency. Structured logs cover publish, asset ingestion, session starts, accepted/rejected verification, and sanitized API failures without recording answers, credentials, bearer tokens, or raw evidence.\n\n## Data and migration\n\nSQLite migration `20260717213000_tall_tale_studio_phase1` and MySQL migration `0003_tall_tale_studio_phase1` add the same domain. The seed is idempotent and additive: it preserves legacy Campaign rows and rebuilds only the known development Studio tale.\n\nFor local SQLite:\n\n```powershell\nnpm run db:generate\nnpm run db:migrate\nnpm run db:seed\n```\n\nFor a fresh MySQL database, apply the three numbered scripts in order as documented in `docs/deployment.md`.\n\n## Operational checklist\n\nBefore release, run `npm run validate`. Manually confirm narrow/mobile editor navigation, draft conflict messaging with two windows, published-session pinning after publishing a newer release, asset archive protection, Captain disconnect/reconnect state, and helper rejection cases. Keep `.data/tall-tale-assets` or the configured durable asset root backed up alongside the database.\n\r\n# Architecture\n\n## Phase 3 cinematic companion projection\n\nThe player reads one server-filtered `PublicSnapshot` containing chapters, released hints/annotations, visible map locations/routes, safe artifact states, visible optional mysteries, event-derived log entries, generic finale state, and per-section unseen counts. One SSE connection transports ordered sanitized events; section navigation is client-side and starts no independent polling.\n\nNew normalized records are `MapRoute` and `ViewedContent`. Existing content models gained release, relationship, placement, and safe-label fields rather than duplicating derived display tables. `AudioPreference` now carries the cross-device preference projection; immediate UI choices may also be cached locally for offline startup.\n\n```mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  P[Player journal + animation director] -->|snapshot + access cookie| N[Next.js server]\n  G[Quartermaster] -->|session + CSRF| N\n  N -->|Prisma transaction| D[(SQLite dev / MySQL prod)]\n  N -->|ordered SSE + replay| P\n  N --> A[Audit and save-state log]\n```\n\nServer Components enforce initial access. Route handlers own authentication, validation, snapshots, and SSE. `src/server/progression.ts` is the transaction boundary; `src/domain/story.ts` owns state rules. The UI receives only a public projection, never database rows. In-memory publish accelerates same-process delivery while database replay by sequence remains authoritative after reconnect/restart.\n\nThe client adds one animation director between ordered domain events and presentation. It starts server work immediately, allows only non-authoritative opening/idle motion while pending, and selects a success or failure timeline from the actual response. One queue owns SSE ceremonies, and the public snapshot remains authoritative after skip, cancellation, reconnect, or visual-runtime failure.\n\nMajor dependencies remain deliberately bounded: Prisma for persistence and transactions, bcryptjs for portable hashes, Zod for payload validation, GSAP for cinematic orchestration, Motion for React interaction/presence, StPageFlip for the journal surface, Rive/Lottie for isolated vector assets, Pino for structured redacted logs, and Vitest/Playwright for validation. See `docs/animation/architecture.md` and `docs/animation/library-ownership.md`.\n\nPhase 3 adds an administrative intent layer. `/api/gm/preview` projects without writes, `/api/gm/staging` persists unreleased intent, and `/api/gm/commands` enforces expected sequence and idempotency. `PlayerPresence` supplies expiring evidence. See [admin command pipeline](admin-command-pipeline.md) and [player presence](player-presence-and-sync.md).\n\n## Tall Tale Studio Phase 1\n\nStudio is additive to the original campaign companion. `TallTale` owns identity and catalog metadata; `TaleDraft` owns optimistic autosave state; chapters, blocks, and connections form the editable graph. Publishing validates that graph and writes a complete, checksummed `PublishedTaleVersion.contentSnapshot`. Published rows and referenced asset variants are immutable from the player runtime's perspective.\n\n`src/tall-tale/progression.ts` is the authoritative session engine. Each non-preview `TaleSession` is pinned to one published version and advances through idempotent, ordered events. The player receives its current projection and SSE updates; Captain actions call the same engine. Verification providers all enter through one versioned submission contract, so the simulator and a future paired helper cannot bypass progression rules. See `docs/tall-tale-studio.md`.\n\r\n# Shared development documentation\n\n`Development_Docs` is the canonical repository location for shared development references, requirements, architecture notes, design decisions, implementation plans, testing notes, meeting notes, and other planning material that should remain available across Codex sessions and computers.\n\nFiles in this directory are normal Git-tracked project files. The repository's end-of-task synchronization workflow inspects additions, modifications, renames, moves, and deletions here and, after safety checks, can commit and push them through the same approved branch workflow used for `Codex_Chats`. The files are not copied into the conversation archive or packaged into a second store.\n\n## Working from another computer\n\nBefore relying on or editing these documents:\n\n1. Confirm that this is the intended repository and branch with `git remote -v`, `git branch --show-current`, and `git status --short --branch`.\n2. Preserve and review any local modifications. Do not reset, clean, restore, or force-push them away.\n3. Run `git fetch --prune origin`, then compare the branch with its upstream using `git rev-list --left-right --count \"HEAD...@{upstream}\"`.\n4. If the branch is only behind and the working tree is clean, update it with `git pull --ff-only`. If it is ahead, diverged, or locally modified, reconcile the work deliberately before editing these documents.\n5. If Git reports a conflict, preserve both versions and resolve it visibly. Do not push unresolved conflict markers. For an unmergeable binary document, retain clearly named local and remote variants for review when repository conventions permit.\n\nThis pull-before-edit check matters: a Codex session on a different computer must synchronize the latest repository state before treating local `Development_Docs` content as current.\n\n## Safety and change behavior\n\nDo not store secrets, credentials, private keys, access or API tokens, production database exports, private authentication caches, or sensitive company information here unless both the repository and the specific contents have been explicitly approved for that purpose. This repository may be publicly visible. Temporary, recovery, credential-shaped, and obvious secret files are ignored, and the synchronizer also checks changed file names, bounded textual content, and file sizes before staging.\n\nDeleting a tracked file locally and committing that deletion also removes it from the GitHub version after the commit is pushed. Git history can still preserve earlier versions of documents that were changed or deleted, subject to the repository's retention and history policies.\n\nPreserve authored formatting and native file types. Do not rewrite a document merely to normalize it, and do not use this directory as a dumping ground for terminal output, build artifacts, dependency archives, database dumps, application installers, or routine generated test results.\n\nGit tracks files rather than empty directories. A new subdirectory is synchronized automatically when it contains an eligible file; use an intentional `.gitkeep` only when preserving an otherwise empty directory is genuinely necessary.\n\r\nALTER
