**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T02:29:40.345Z

The inventory found a useful seam: immutable published snapshots, version-pinned runtime sessions, Studio validation, Captain controls, hashed browser session tokens, and server-authorized media already exist. I’m preserving those. The implementation will evolve the existing `TaleSession` into the playthrough aggregate and add identity/membership/invitation/audit/reveal records around it, avoiding a second competing Tall Tale stack. I’m recording that decision and the migration risks in `Development_Docs` before source edits, as the specification requires.

## Tool Call: exec
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T02:29:59.808Z

const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt/Development_Docs/Tall_Tale_Platform_Implementation_Record.md\n+# Tall Tale Platform implementation record\n+\n+Status: implementation in progress  \n+Specification: `Tall_Tale_Platform_Codex_Implementation_Specification.pdf`  \n+Repository baseline: `main` at `d0906e2`, synchronized with `origin/main` on 2026-07-17\n+\n+## Repository inventory before implementation\n+\n+The current application already provides two additive but connected domains:\n+\n+- The original `Campaign` companion supports password-only Player access, the Quartermaster/Game Master command center, ordered progression events, presence, server-side public projections, CSRF-protected Captain mutations, audit records, and sanitized SSE.\n+- Tall Tale Studio Phase 1 provides `TallTale`, editable `TaleDraft` graphs, immutable checksummed `PublishedTaleVersion` snapshots, version-pinned `TaleSession` runtime records, ordered idempotent session events, authorized media variants, Creator validation/publishing, Captain session controls, helper verification, and Player runtime pages.\n+\n+Current primary routes are `/`, `/tale/[campaignSlug]`, `/quartermaster`, `/tales`, `/play/[taleSlug]`, `/play/[taleSlug]/session/[sessionId]`, `/captain`, and `/studio`. Existing GM credentials and server-side sessions are shared by Captain and Creator capabilities. Existing Tall Tale Player sessions use an opaque random token whose hash is persisted and whose clear value is stored only in an HttpOnly cookie, but they do not yet provide a durable Player identity, library, invitation lifecycle, or multi-playthrough history selector.\n+\n+## Architecture decision\n+\n+The platform implementation will extend the existing domain rather than introduce a disconnected replacement:\n+\n+- `TallTale` remains the authored identity.\n+- `PublishedTaleVersion` remains the immutable release and historical rendering source.\n+- `TaleSession` becomes the persisted playthrough aggregate. Existing preview-session behavior remains isolated through `previewMode`; every real new playthrough must reference one published version.\n+- New Player profile/session, membership, invitation, invitation-event, reveal-state, scoped-role, and platform-audit records provide identity, library access, invitation lifecycle, revocation, and traceability.\n+- Existing `GameMasterUser` credentials remain the strong account authority. Scoped role assignments supplement existing capability checks without invalidating current Captain/Creator logins.\n+- Workspace-specific services return explicit Player-safe, Captain, and Creator view models. Raw Prisma entities and complete published snapshots are never serialized to Player library or invitation clients.\n+- Existing `/tales`, `/play/[taleSlug]`, and `/captain` paths receive safe compatibility behavior while `/player/*`, `/join/*`, `/captain/library`, `/captain/invitations`, and `/studio/library` become the canonical platform families.\n+\n+## Migration and compatibility risks\n+\n+1. Existing `TaleSession` rows may already be active or completed. The migration must preserve their identifiers, access-token hashes, version binding, state, event order, inventory, variables, and timestamps.\n+2. Legacy sessions do not have a durable Player profile or membership. Backfill must create deterministic guest profiles and memberships without changing their current runtime cookie behavior.\n+3. Existing status values start at `ACTIVE`; new setup and invitation states must be accepted without breaking the progression engine, which may mutate only `ACTIVE` or `PAUSED` sessions and must keep `COMPLETED` terminal.\n+4. Existing GM role/capability behavior must remain functional while explicit Captain and Creator denial is enforced on every new route and API.\n+5. Published asset responses currently authorize by version identity. Player requests must additionally prove membership/session access and reveal scope; public-safe cover variants require a narrowly defined exception.\n+6. SQLite is the supported local and test database, while a MySQL-parity migration must be maintained. The migration is additive and rollback is backup/restore plus application rollback; destructive down-migrations are not automated.\n+7. The repository is public. Seeded accounts, invitations, story copy, names, PINs, and media remain fictional development data only.\n+\n+## Vertical implementation slices\n+\n+1. Add additive schema/migrations, domain state machines, authorization policies, token hashing, backfill, and development fixtures.\n+2. Add secure Player session/sign-in, invitation resolution/acceptance/decline, library projection, waiting room, archive projection, and protected asset policy.\n+3. Add Captain library, atomic playthrough/invitation creation, secure link/QR/short-code delivery, lifecycle management, launch synchronization, and audit history.\n+4. Add the three-role cinematic gateway, role-aware sign-in and workspace switching, responsive Player/Captain screens, reduced-motion behavior, and compatibility redirects.\n+5. Complete version comparison, restore/fork ancestry, immutable-release guards, authorization/concurrency tests, full role-journey browser coverage, migration validation, and documentation.\n+\n+## Completion evidence\n+\n+This section will be updated after implementation with migration results, automated test counts, manual desktop/mobile checks, authorization probes, historical-version proof, remaining production risks, and exact Git state.\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

currentSession.status === \"COMPLETED\"\n              ? \"COMPLETED\"\n              : \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n            : \"NEW\",\n        sessionId: currentSession?.taleId === tale.id ? currentSession.sessionId : null,\n      })),\n  });\n}\n\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ taleSlug: string }> }) {\n  const tale = await db.tallTale.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      slug: (await context.params).taleSlug,\n      archivedAt: null,\n      status: \"PUBLISHED\",\n      visibility: { in: [\"PUBLIC\", \"UNLISTED\"] },\n    },\n    include: { versions: { where: { isCurrent: true }, take: 1 } },\n  });\n  const version = tale?.versions[0];\n  if (!tale || !version) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This Tall Tale is not available.\" }, { status: 404 });\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    tale: {\n      id: tale.id,\n      slug: tale.slug,\n      title: tale.title,\n      subtitle: tale.subtitle,\n      shortDescription: tale.shortDescription,\n      longDescription: tale.longDescription,\n      coverUrl: tale.coverAssetId ? `/api/media/${tale.coverAssetId}?variant=PREVIEW&version=${version.id}` : null,\n      estimatedDuration: tale.estimatedDuration,\n      playerCountMin: tale.playerCountMin,\n      playerCountMax: tale.playerCountMax,\n      contentWarnings: tale.contentWarnings,\n      version: version.versionLabel,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\r\nexport async function getTaleSessionState(sessionId: string, token?: string, captain = false) {\r\n  const session = await db.taleSession.findUniqueOrThrow({\r\n    where: { id: sessionId },\r\n    include: {\r\n      version: true,\r\n      verificationRequests: { where: { status: \"PENDING\" }, orderBy: { requestedAt: \"desc\" }, take: 1 },\r\n      events: { orderBy: { sequence: \"desc\" }, take: 40 },\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  if (!captain && (!token || digest(token) !== session.accessTokenHash))\r\n    throw new Error(\"This voyage session is not available to this browser.\");\r\n  if (session.expiresAt && session.expiresAt < new Date()) throw new Error(\"This preview session has expired.\");\r\n  const snapshot = snapshotOf(session);\r\n  const block = blockById(snapshot, session.currentBlockId);\r\n  const chapter = chapterByBlock(snapshot, session.currentBlockId);\r\n  const request = session.verificationRequests[0] ?? null;\r\n  return {\r\n    session: {\r\n      id: session.id,\r\n      status: session.status,\r\n      previewMode: session.previewMode,\r\n      versionId: identity(session),\r\n      ownerLabel: session.ownerLabel,\r\n      currentSequence: session.currentSequence,\r\n      startedAt: session.startedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      updatedAt: session.updatedAt.toISOString(),\r\n      completedAt: session.completedAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\r\n    },\r\n    tale: snapshot.tale,\r\n    chapter: chapter\r\n      ? { id: chapter.id, title: chapter.title, subtitle: chapter.subtitle, orderIndex: chapter.orderIndex }\r\n      : null,\r\n    block: block\r\n      ? null,\r\n          status: request.status,\r\n        }\r\n      : null,\r\n    inventory: parseJsonArray<string>(session.inventory),\r\n    variables: captain ? parseJsonObject(session.variables) : undefined,\r\n    events: session.events.map((event) => ({\r\n      id: event.id,\r\n      eventType: event.eventType,\r\n      sourceType: event.sourceType,\r\n      blockId: event.blockId,\r\n      sequence: event.sequence,\r\n      payload: parseJsonObject(event.payload),\r\n      createdAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\r\n    })),\r\n    assets: snapshot.assets.map((asset) => ({\r\n      ...asset,\r\n      url: `/api/media/${asset.id}?version=${encodeURIComponent(identity(session))}`,\r\n    })),\r\n    chapters: captain\r\n      ? value : value.trim().replace(/\\s+/g, \" \");\r\n  if (!config.caseSensitive) result = result.toLocaleLowerCase();\r\n  const sessions = await db.taleSession.findMany({\r\n    orderBy: { updatedAt: \"desc\" },\r\n    take: 100,\r\n    include: { tale: true, version: true, verificationRequests: { where: { status: \"PENDING\" }, take: 1 } },\r\n  });\r\n  return sessions.map((session) => ({\r\n    id: session.id,\r\n    taleId: session.taleId,\r\n    taleTitle: session.tale.title,\r\n    versionLabel: session.version?.versionLabel ?? \"Draft preview\",\r\n    ownerLabel: session.ownerLabel,\r\n    status: session.status,\r\n    previewMode: session.previewMode,\r\n    currentBlockId: session.currentBlockId,\r\n    pendingVerification: session.verificationRequests[0]\r\n      ? {\r\n          id: session.verificationRequests[0].id,\r\n          providerType: session.verificationRequests[0].providerType,\r\n          requestedAt: session.verificationRequests[0].requestedAt.toISOString(),\r\n        }\r\n      : null,\r\n    lastEventAt: session.updatedAt.toISOString(),\r\n    connected: Boolean(session.lastHeartbeatAt && Date.now() - session.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime() < 45000),\r\n  }));\r\n}\r\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

undefined,\r\n    shortDescription: source.tale.shortDescription ?? undefined,\r\n    longDescription: source.tale.longDescription ?? undefined,\r\n    theme: source.tale.theme,\r\n    playerCountMin: source.tale.playerCountMin,\r\n    playerCountMax: source.tale.playerCountMax,\r\n    estimatedDuration: source.tale.estimatedDuration ?? blockIds.get(value) : value;\r\n  await saveStudioDraft(\r\n    created.id,\r\n    {\r\n      autosaveVersion: target.draft.autosaveVersion,\r\n      tale: { ...source.tale, title: `${source.tale.title} Copy`, slug, visibility: \"PRIVATE\" },\r\n      chapters: source.draft.chapters.map((chapter) => ({\r\n        ...chapter,\r\n        id: chapterIds.get(chapter.id)!,\r\n        blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({\r\n          ...block,\r\n          id: blockIds.get(block.id)!,\r\n          configuration: {\r\n            ...block.configuration,\r\n            successTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId),\r\n            failureTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId),\r\n            choices: Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)\r\n              ? block.configuration.choices.map((choice) =>\r\n                  choice && typeof choice === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(choice)\r\n                    ? { ...choice, targetBlockId: remapTarget(choice.targetBlockId) }\r\n                    : choice,\r\n                )\r\n              : block.configuration.choices,\r\n          },\r\n        })),\r\n      })),\r\n    },\r\n    creatorId,\r\n  );\r\n  return created;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function restorePublishedVersionToDraft(taleId: string, versionId: string, creatorId: string) {\r\n  const [tale, version, latestDraft] = await Promise.all([\r\n    db.tallTale.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: taleId } }),\r\n    db.publishedTaleVersion.findFirstOrThrow({ where: { id: versionId, taleId } }),\r\n    db.taleDraft.findFirst({ where: { taleId }, orderBy: { revisionNumber: \"desc\" } }),\r\n  ]);\r\n  const snapshot = JSON.parse(version.contentSnapshot) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\r\n  if (snapshot.schemaVersion !== 1 || !Array.isArray(snapshot.chapters))\r\n    throw new Error(\"This published version cannot be copied by the current Studio.\");\r\n\r\n  const previousDraftId = tale.currentDraftRevisionId;\r\n  const draft = await db.taleDraft.create({\r\n    data: {\r\n      taleId,\r\n      revisionNumber: (latestDraft?.revisionNumber ?? 0) + 1,\r\n      basedOnPublishedVersionId: version.id,\r\n      createdBy: creatorId,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  await db.tallTale.update({ where: { id: taleId }, data: { currentDraftRevisionId: draft.id } });\r\n\r\n  const chapterIds = new Map(snapshot.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, crypto.randomUUID()]));\r\n  const blockIds = new Map(\r\n    snapshot.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, crypto.randomUUID()] as const)),\r\n  );\r\n  const remapTarget = (value: unknown) =>\r\n    typeof value === \"string\" && blockIds.has(value) ? blockIds.get(value) : value;\r\n  try {\r\n    await saveStudioDraft(\r\n      taleId,\r\n      {\r\n        autosaveVersion: draft.autosaveVersion,\r\n        tale: {\r\n          ...snapshot.tale,\r\n          slug: tale.slug,\r\n          visibility: snapshot.tale.visibility as \"PRIVATE\" | \"UNLISTED\" | \"PUBLIC\",\r\n        },\r\n        chapters: snapshot.chapters.map((chapter) => ({\r\n          ...chapter,\r\n          id: chapterIds.get(chapter.id)!,\r\n          blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({\r\n            ...block,\r\n            id: blockIds.get(block.id)!,\r\n            configuration: {\r\n              ...block.configuration,\r\n              successTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId),\r\n              failureTargetBlockId: remapTarget(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId),\r\n              choices: Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)\r\n                ? block.configuration.choices.map((choice) =>\r\n                    choice && typeof choice === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(choice)\r\n                      ? { ...choice, targetBlockId: remapTarget(choice.targetBlockId) }\r\n                      : choice,\r\n                  )\r\n                : block.configuration.choices,\r\n            },\r\n          })),\r\n        })),\r\n      },\r\n      creatorId,\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (cause) {\r\n    await db.taleDraft.delete({ where: { id: draft.id } }).catch(() => undefined);\r\n    await db.tallTale\r\n      .update({ where: { id: taleId }, data: { currentDraftRevisionId: previousDraftId } })\r\n      .catch(() => undefined);\r\n    throw cause;\r\n  }\r\n  return { draftId: draft.id, basedOnPublishedVersionId: version.id, revisionNumber: draft.revisionNumber };\r\n}\r\nimport { TaleEditorSection } from \"@/components/studio/TaleEditorSection\";\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\nexport default async function Page({ params }: { params: Promise<{ taleId: string }> }) {\n  return <TaleEditorSection taleId={(await params).taleId} section=\"versions\" />;\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

randomUUID();\n+  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const claimed = await tx.invitation.updateMany({\n+      where: {\n+        id: invitation.id,\n+        status: { in: activeInvitationStates },\n+        redemptionCount: invitation.redemptionCount,\n+        expiresAt: { gt: new Date() },\n+      },\n+      data: {\n+        status: \"READY\",\n+        acceptedAt: Refresh and try again.\", \"CONFLICT\");\n+    let playerId = signedInPlayerId ?? invitation.intendedPlayerId;\n+    if (!playerId) {\n+      const player = await tx.playerProfile.create({\n+        data: { displayName: input.displayName?.trim() || invitation.recipientName },\n+      });\n+      playerId = player.id;\n+    } else if (input.displayName?.trim()) {\n+      await tx.playerProfile.update({ where: { id: playerId }, data: { displayName: input.displayName.trim() } });\n+    }\n+    if (signedInPlayerId && invitation.intendedPlayerId && signedInPlayerId !== invitation.intendedPlayerId) {\n+      await tx.playthroughMembership.deleteMany({\n+        where: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, playerProfileId: invitation.intendedPlayerId },\n+      });\n+    }\n+    await tx.playthroughMembership.upsert({\n+      where: { playthroughId_playerProfileId: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, playerProfileId: playerId } },\n+      update: {     joinedAt: new Date(),\n+      },\n+    });\n+    const remaining = await tx.invitation.count({\n+      where: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, status: { in: activeInvitationStates } },\n+    });\n+    if (!remaining)\n+      await tx.taleSession.updateMany({\n+        where: { id: invitation.playthroughId, status: { in: [\"INVITING\", \"SCHEDULED\"] } },\n+        data: { status: invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt ? \"SCHEDULED\" : \"READY\", concurrencyVersion: { increment: 1 } },\n+      });\n+    await tx.invitationEvent.create({\n+      data: { invitationId: invitation.id, eventType: \"ACCEPTED\", actorType: \"PLAYER\", actorId: playerId, metadata: \"{}\" },\n+    });\n+    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\n+      data: {\n+        actorType: \"PLAYER\",\n+        actorId: playerId,\n+        action: \"INVITATION_ACCEPTED\",\n+        resourceType: \"INVITATION\",\n+        resourceId: invitation.id,\n+        correlationId,\n+ });\n+}\n+\n+export async function declineInvitation(credential: string, signedInPlayerId?: string) {\n+  const invitation = await getInvitation(credential);\n+  if (!invitation || { id: invitationId },\n+    include: { playthrough: { include: { tale: true } } },\n+  });\n+  if (!invitation || invitation.playthrough.captainId !== actorId) throw new Error(\"Invitation not db.invitationEvent.create({\n+        data: { invitationId, eventType: \"COPIED\", actorType: \"CAPTAIN\", actorId, metadata: \"{}\" },\n+      }),\n+    ]);\n+    return { ok: true };\n+  }\n+  if (action === \"extend\") {\n+    if (!activeInvitationStates.includes(invitation.status)) throw new Error(\"Only a pending invitation can be extended.\");\n+    const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + Math.min(Math.max(extendHours, 1), 24 * 90) * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n+    await db.$transaction([\n+      db.invitation.update({ where: { id: invitation.id }, data: { expiresAt } }),\n+      db.invitationEvent.create({\n+        data: { invitationId, eventType: \"EXPIRATION_EXTENDED\", actorType: \"CAPTAIN\", actorId, metadata: \"{}\" },\n+      }),\n+    ]);\n+    return { ok: true, revoked.\");\n+    await db.$transaction([\n+      db.invitation.update({ where: { id: invitation.id }, data: { status: \"REVOKED\", revokedAt: new Date() } }),\n+      db.playthroughMembership.updateMany({\n+        where: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, playerProfileId: invitation.intendedPlayerId ?? undefined },\n+        data: { status: \"REMOVED\", removedAt: new Date() },\n+      }),\n+      db.invitationEvent.create({\n+        data: { invitationId, eventType: \"REVOKED\", actorType: \"CAPTAIN\", actorId, metadata: \"{}\" },\n+      }),\n+    ]);\n+    return { ok: true };\n+  }\n+  if (!activeInvitationStates.includes(invitation.status)) throw new Error(\"Only a pending invitation can be replaced.\");\n+  const token = makeToken(36);\n+  const shortCode = makeShortCode();\n+  const replacement = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    await tx.invitation.update({ where: { id: invitation.id }, data: { status: \"REPLACED\", revokedAt: new Date() } });\n+    const created = await tx.invitation.create({\n+      data: {\n+        playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId,\n+        intendedPlayerId: invitation.intendedPlayerId,\n+        tokenHash: hashToken(token),\n+        tokenPrefix: token.slice(0, 8),\n+        shortCodeHash: hashToken(normalizeShortCode(shortCode)),\n+        shortCodePrefix: normalizeShortCode(shortCode).slice(0, 4),\n+        pinHash: invitation.pinHash,\n+        recipientName: invitation.recipientName,\n+        deliveryMethods: invitation.deliveryMethods,\n+        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + extendHours * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n+        maxRedemptions: invitation.maxRedemptions,\n+        replacesInvitationId: invitation.id,\n+        createdBy: actorId,\n+      },\n+    });\n+    await tx.invitationEvent.createMany({\n+      data: [\n+        { invitationId: invitation.id, eventType: \"REPLACED\", actorType: \"CAPTAIN\", actorId, metadata: JSON.stringify({ replacementId: created.id }) },\n+        { invitationId: created.id, eventType: \"CREATED\", actorType: \"CAPTAIN\", actorId, metadata: JSON.stringify({ replacesId: invitation.id }) },\n+      ],\n+    });\n+    return created;\n+  });\n+  const link = `${baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, \"\")}/join/${token}`;\n+  return {\n+    ok: true,\n+    replacement: {\n+      id: replacement.id,\n+      link,\n+      shortCode,\n+      qrCodeDataUrl: await QRCode.toDataURL(link, { errorCorrectionLevel: \"M\", margin: 2, width: 480 }),\n+      message: `${invitation.recipientName}, your replacement invitation to ${invitation.playthrough.tale.title} is ready. Open ${link} or enter code ${shortCode}.`,\n+      expiresAt: replacement.expiresAt.toISOString(),\n+    },\n+  };\n+}\n*** End Patch";

session.status,\n+    plannedStartAt: session.plannedStartAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\n+    lastActivityAt: session.updatedAt.toISOString(),\n+    currentSequence: session.currentSequence,\n+    currentBlockId: session.currentBlockId,\n+    connected: Boolean(session.lastHeartbeatAt && Date.now() - session.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime() < 45_000),\n+    pendingAction: session.verificationRequests[0]?.providerType ?? null,\n+    players: session.memberships.map((membership) => ({\n+      id: membership.player.id,\n+      displayName: membership.player.displayName,\n+      status: membership.status,\n+    })),\n+    invitationSummary: session.invitations.reduce<Record<string, number>>((summary, invitation) => {\n+      summary[invitation.status] = (summary[invitation.status] ?? 0) + 1;\n+      return summary;\n+    }, {}),\n+  }));\n+  return {\n+    groups: {\n+      needsAttention: cards.filter(\n+        (card) => card.pendingAction || [\"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\"].includes(card.status) || card.players.some((player) => player.status === \"READY\"),\n+      activeVoyages: cards.filter((card) => [\"ACTIVE\", \"PAUSED\"].includes(card.status)),\n+      readyToLaunch: cards.filter((card) => [\"INVITING\", \"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\"].includes(card.status)),\n+      completedPlaythroughs: cards.filter((card) => card.status === \"COMPLETED\"),\n+    },\n+    invitations: sessions.flatMap((session) =>\n+      session.invitations.map((invitation) => ({\n+        id: invitation.id,\n+        playthroughId: session.id,\n+        taleTitle: session.tale.title,\n+        voyageName: session.voyageName ?? session.ownerLabel,\n+        versionLabel: session.version?.versionLabel ?? null,\n+        recipientName: invitation.recipientName,\n+        status: invitation.status,\n+        tokenPrefix: invitation.tokenPrefix,\n+        shortCodePrefix: invitation.shortCodePrefix,\n+        expiresAt: invitation.expiresAt.toISOString(),\n+        viewedAt: invitation.viewedAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\n+        acceptedAt: invitation.acceptedAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\n+        replacementId: invitation.replacement?.id ?? null,\n+        lastActivityAt: invitation.events[0]?.createdAt.toISOString() ?? invitation.updatedAt.toISOString(),\n+      })),\n+    ),\n+    publishedTales: tales.map((tale) => ({\n+      id: tale.id,\n+      slug: tale.slug,\n+      title: tale.title,\n+      subtitle: tale.subtitle,\n+      visibility: tale.visibility,\n+      versions: tale.versions.map((version) => ({\n+        id: version.id,\n+        label: version.versionLabel,\n+        publishedAt: version.publishedAt.toISOString(),\n+        activeRunCount: version._count.sessions,\n+      })),\n+    })),\n+    serverTime: new Date().toISOString(),\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export function playerSafeAssetIds(snapshotRaw: string, eventBlockIds: Array<string | null>, inventoryRaw: string) {\n+  const snapshot = parsePublishedSnapshot(snapshotRaw);\n+  const visited = new Set(eventBlockIds.filter(Boolean) as string[]);\n+  const values = new Set(parseJsonArray<string>(inventoryRaw));\n+  for (const chapter of snapshot.chapters)\n+    for (const block of chapter.blocks) if (visited.has(block.id)) stringValues(safeObject(block.configuration), values);\n+  if (snapshot.tale.coverAssetId) values.add(snapshot.tale.coverAssetId);\n+  return values;\n+}\n+\n+export { safeObject as playerSafeObject };\n*** End Patch";

configured : null) ?? blocksOf(snapshot)[0];\n+  if (!first) throw new Error(\"This published version has no playable entry block.\");\n+  const correlationId = randomUUID();\n+  const event = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n+    const claimed = await tx.taleSession.updateMany({\n+      where: {\n+        id: sessionId,\n+        status: { in: [\"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\"] },\n+        concurrencyVersion: expectedVersion ?? session.concurrencyVersion,\n+      },\n+      data: {\n+        status: \"ACTIVE\",\n+        launchedAt: new Date(),\n+        captainId: actorId,\n+        concurrencyVersion: { increment: 1 },\n+      },\n+    });\n+    if (!claimed.count) throw new Error(\"Voyage state changed before launch. 401 });\n  const after = Number(request.headers.get(\"last-event-id\") ?? new URL(request.url).searchParams.get(\"after\") ?? 0);\n  const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n  let heartbeat: ReturnType<typeof setInterval>;\n  const stream = new ReadableStream({\n    async start(controller) {\n      const send = (event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: string }) =>\n        controller.enqueue(\n          encoder.encode(`id: ${event.sequence}\\nevent: progression\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(event)}\\n\\n`),\n        );\n      controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\": captain channel connected\\n\\n\"));\n      const missed = await db.taleSessionEvent.findMany({\n        where: { sessionId, sequence: { gt: Number.isFinite(after) ? after : 0 } },\n        orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" },\n      });\n      for (const event of missed)\n        send({\n          id: event.id,\n          eventType: event.eventType,\n          sequence: event.sequence,\n          createdAt: event.createdAt.toISOString(),\n        });\n      const channel = `tale-session:${sessionId}`;\n      eventBus.on(channel, send);\n      heartbeat = setInterval(\n        () => controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`event: heartbeat\\ndata: ${Date.now()}\\n\\n`)),\n        15000,\n      );\n      request.signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", () => {\n        clearInterval(heartbeat);\n        eventBus.off(channel, send);\n        try {\n          controller.close();\n        } catch {}\n      });\n    },\n    cancel() {\n      clearInterval(heartbeat);\n    },\n  });\n  return new Response(stream, {\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"text/event-stream\",\n      \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache, no-transform\",\n      Connection: \"keep-alive\",\n      \"X-Accel-Buffering\": \"no\",\n    },\n  });\n}\n\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\nimport { getTaleSessionState, interactWithTaleSession } from \"@/tall-tale/progression\";\nimport { readTaleSessionCookie } from \"@/tall-tale/session-cookie\";\nimport { consumeRateLimit, rateLimitHeaders } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function GET(_: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\n  try {\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\n    const access = await readTaleSessionCookie(sessionId);\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n    return NextResponse.json(await getTaleSessionState(sessionId, access.token));\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\n  try {\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\n    const access = await readTaleSessionCookie(sessionId);\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\n    const rate = consumeRateLimit(`tale-player:${sessionId}`, { limit: 45, windowMs: 60_000 });\n    if (!rate.allowed)\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many voyage actions. Wait a moment before trying again.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rate) },\n      );\n    return NextResponse.json(await interactWithTaleSession(sessionId, access.token, await request.json()));\n  } catch (cause) {\n    return apiError(cause);\n  }\n}\n\r\nimport { EventEmitter } from \"node:events\";\nimport type { ClientProgressEvent } from \"@/domain/story\";\n\nconst globalEvents = globalThis as unknown as { foreverEvents?: EventEmitter };\nexport const eventBus = globalEvents.foreverEvents ?? new EventEmitter();\neventBus.setMaxListeners(100);\nif (!globalEvents.foreverEvents) globalEvents.foreverEvents = eventBus;\n\nexport function publishCampaignEvent(campaignId: string, event: ClientProgressEvent) {\n  eventBus.emit(`campaign:${campaignId}`, event);\n}\n\nexport function publishTaleSessionEvent(\n  sessionId: string,\n  event: { id: string; eventType: string; sequence: number; createdAt: string },\n) {\n  eventBus.emit(`tale-session:${sessionId}`, event);\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

Wait fifteen minutes before trying again.\" },\n      { status: 429 },\n    );\n  const user = await db.gameMasterUser.findUnique({ where: { username: parsed.data.username } });\n  const valid = Boolean(user && (await bcrypt.compare(parsed.data.password, user.passwordHash)));\n  await db.loginAttempt.create({ data: { fingerprint, succeeded: valid } });\n  if (!valid || !user)\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"The quartermaster does not recognize those credentials.\" }, { status: 401 });\n  const csrfToken = await createGmSession(user.id);\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, csrfToken });\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n\ntype TaleCard = {\n  id: string;\n  slug: string;\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string | null;\n  shortDescription: string | null;\n  status: string;\n  visibility: string;\n  savedAt: string;\n  validationState: string;\n  latestVersion: string | null;\n  sessionCount: number;\n  assetCount: number;\n};\n\nexport function StudioHome({ authenticated }: { authenticated: boolean }) {\n  const [tales, setTales] = useState<TaleCard[]>([]);\n  const [csrf, setCsrf] = useState(\"\");\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"recent\");\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(\"\");\n\n  async function load() {\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/studio/tales\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { tales?: TaleCard[]; csrfToken?: string; error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"The Studio ledger could not be opened.\");\n    setTales(body.tales ?? []);\n    setCsrf(body.csrfToken ?? \"\");\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!authenticated) return;\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\n  }, [authenticated]);\n\n  const visible = useMemo(() => {\n    const filtered = tales.filter((tale) =>\n      `${tale.title} ${tale.subtitle ?? \"\"} ${tale.shortDescription ?? \"\"}`\n        .toLocaleLowerCase()\n        .includes(query.toLocaleLowerCase()),\n    );\n    return filtered.sort((left, right) =>\n      sort === \"title\"\n        ? left.title.localeCompare(right.title)\n        : sort === \"status\"\n          ? left.status.localeCompare(right.status)\n          : Date.parse(right.savedAt) - Date.parse(left.savedAt),\n    );\n  }, [query, sort, tales]);\n\n  async function act(tale: TaleCard, action: \"duplicate\" | \"archive\" | \"restore\") {\n    if (\n      (action === \"archive\" || action === \"restore\") &&\n      !window.confirm(`${action === \"archive\" ? \"Archive\" : \"Restore\"} â€œ${tale.title}â€?`)\n    )\n      return;\n    setBusy(tale.id);\n    setError(\"\");\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/studio/tales/${tale.id}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action }),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The ledger action failed.\");\n    await load();\n    setBusy(\"\");\n  }\n\n  if (!authenticated)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"studio-auth-gate\">\n        <section>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Tall Tale Studio</p>\n          <h1>The Cartographer&apos;s Table is locked.</h1>\n          <p>Sign in through the Quartermaster&apos;s Log with a creator-capable account, then return here.</p>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/quartermaster\">\n            Open Quartermaster login\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"studio-home\">\n      <header className=\"studio-home-header\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Authoring waters</p>\n          <h1>Tall Tale Studio</h1>\n          <p>Draft stories, bind their assets, and publish voyages from one authoritative chart.</p>\n        </div>\n        <nav aria-label=\"Studio destinations\">\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Player catalog</Link>\n          <Link href=\"/captain\">Captain controls</Link>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/studio/tales/new\">\n            Create New Tall Tale\n          </Link>\n        </nav>\n      </header>\n      <section className=\"studio-toolbar\" aria-label=\"Find Tall Tales\">\n        <label>\n          <span>Search</span>\n          <input\n            value={query}\n            onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Title, subtitle, or description\"\n          />\n        </label>\n        <label>\n          <span>Sort</span>\n          <select value={sort} onChange={(event) => setSort(event.target.value)}>\n            <option value=\"recent\">Last saved</option>\n            <option value=\"title\">Title</option>\n            <option value=\"status\">Status</option>\n          </select>\n        </label>\n        <p aria-live=\"polite\">\n          {visible.length} {visible.length === 1 ? \"tale\" : \"tales\"}\n        </p>\n      </section>\n      {error && (\n        <p className=\"studio-error\" role=\"alert\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n      )}\n      {!visible.length ? (\n        <section className=\"studio-empty\">\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</span>\n          <h2>No Tall Tales on this chart</h2>\n          <p>Create the first editable voyage, or clear the current search.</p>\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/studio/tales/new\">\n            Create a Tall Tale\n          </Link>\n        </section>\n      ) : (\n        <section className=\"tale-card-grid\" aria-label=\"Tall Tales\">\n          {visible.map((tale) => (\n            <article className={`tale-studio-card status-${tale.status.toLowerCase()}`} key={tale.id}>\n              <div className=\"tale-card-stamp\">{tale.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</div>\n              <p className=\"card-kicker\">\n                {tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()} Â·{\" \"}\n                {tale.latestVersion ? `version ${tale.latestVersion}` : \"not published\"}\n              </p>\n              <h2>{tale.title}</h2>\n              <p>{tale.subtitle ?? tale.shortDescription ?? \"No summary has been inked yet.\"}</p>\n              <dl>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Last saved</dt>\n                  <dd>{new Date(tale.savedAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Validation</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.validationState.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Library</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.assetCount} assets</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Sessions</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.sessionCount}</dd>\n                </div>\n              </dl>\n              <div className=\"tale-card-actions\">\n                <Link className=\"primary\" href={`/studio/tales/${tale.id}`}>\n                  Open editor\n                </Link>\n                {tale.latestVersion && (\n                  <Link href={`/play/${tale.slug}`} target=\"_blank\">\n                    Player preview\n                  </Link>\n                )}\n                <button disabled={busy === tale.id} onClick={() => void act(tale, \"duplicate\")}>\n                  Duplicate\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  disabled={busy === tale.id}\n                  onClick={() => void act(tale, tale.status === \"ARCHIVED\" ? \"restore\" : \"archive\")}\n                >\n                  {tale.status === \"ARCHIVED\" ? \"Restore\" : \"Archive\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </article>\n          ))}\n        </section>\n      )}\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

0.28,\n+      });\n+    },\n+    { scope: root, dependencies: [mode], revertOnUpdate: true },\n+  );\n+\n+  useEffect(() => {\n+    void fetch(\"/api/gateway/status\", { cache: \"no-store\" })\n+      .then((response) => (response.ok ? response.json() : null))\n+      .then((value: GatewayStatus | null) => setStatus(value))\n+      .catch(() => setStatus(null));\n+    if (!root.current) return;\n+    const key = \"tall-tale-role-gateway\";\n+    const scene = sessionStorage.getItem(key) === \"seen\" ? \"session-reentry\" : \"first-arrival\";\n+    sessionStorage.setItem(key, \"seen\");\n+    void director.play(scene, { root: root.current, queue: false }).catch(() => undefined);\n+    return () => director.cancel(\"gateway-unmounted\");\n+  }, [director]);\n+\n+  function continuation(role: (typeof roles)[number]) {\n+    const current = status?.[role.id];\n+    return current?.authenticated && current.continue ? current.continue : { label: `Enter as ${role.title}`, href: role.href };\n+  }\n+\n+  const replay = () => {\n+    if (root.current) void director.play(\"first-arrival\", { root: root.current, queue: false }).catch(() => undefined);\n+  };\n+\n+  return (\n+    <main ref={root} className=\"harbor-landing role-gateway\" data-motion-mode={mode}>\n+      <div className=\"harbor-sky\" data-scene-part=\"sky\" data-gsap-owned aria-hidden=\"true\">\n+        <div className=\"star-field\" data-scene-part=\"stars\">\n+          {Array.from({ length: 28 }, (_, index) => (\n+            <i key={index} />\n+          ))}\n+        </div>\n+        <div className=\"moon-glow\" data-scene-part=\"moon\" />\n+        <div className=\"distant-clouds\" data-scene-part=\"fog-back\" />\n+      </div>\n+      <div className=\"harbor-horizon\" data-scene-part=\"horizon\" data-gsap-owned aria-hidden=\"true\">\n+        <div className=\"distant-ship\" data-scene-part=\"ship\">\n+          <i />\n+          <i />\n+        </div>\n+      </div>\n+      <LottieEffect asset={lottieAssets.moonlitWaves} mode={mode} label=\"Moonlight moving across the harbor\" className=\"harbor-waves\" />\n+      <LottieEffect asset={lottieAssets.rollingFog} mode={mode} label=\"Fog rolling over the harbor\" className=\"harbor-fog\" />\n+      <div className=\"foreground-dock\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><span className=\"dock-rope\" /></div>\n+      <div className=\"hanging-lantern\" data-ambient=\"lantern\" data-gsap-owned aria-hidden=\"true\"><i /></div>\n+      <div className=\"nautical-border\" data-scene-part=\"nautical-border\" data-gsap-owned aria-hidden=\"true\" />\n+\n+      <section className=\"harbor-content gateway-content\" aria-labelledby=\"gateway-title\">\n+        <p className=\"eyebrow\" data-scene-part=\"arrival-copy\" data-gsap-owned>The chart table is ready</p>\n+        <h1 id=\"gateway-title\" data-scene-part=\"title\" data-gsap-owned>Choose your place in the Tale</h1>\n+        <p data-scene-part=\"arrival-copy\" data-gsap-owned>\n+          One living collection of adventures opens three different ways. 0} {current.waitingPlayers === 1 ? \"Player\" : \"Players\"} awaiting launch</small>\n+                )}\n+                {role.id === \"creator\" && current?.authenticated && current.recentDraft && <small>Recent draft: {current.recentDraft.title}</small>}\n+                <Link className=\"role-entry\" href={next.href} aria-describedby={`role-${role.id}-description`}>\n+                  {next.label}\n+                </Link>\n+                <span id={`role-${role.id}-description`} className=\"sr-only\">{role.copy}</span>\n+              </motion.article>\n+            );\n+          })}\n+        </div>\n+        <Link className=\"invitation-code-link\" href=\"/player/sign-in#invitation-code\">Have an invitation code?</Link>\n+      </section>\n+      <div className=\"landing-controls\" aria-label=\"Gateway presentation controls\">\n+        <button onClick={replay} disabled={snapshot.isPlaying}>Replay gateway</button>\n+        {snapshot.isPlaying && snapshot.label !== \"dark-sea\" && <button onClick={() => director.skip()}>Skip arrival</button>}\n+        <button onClick={cycle} aria-label={`Motion: ${mode}. {tab === \"invitations\" && <section className=\"invitation-dashboard\"><header><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Tracked security objects</p><h2>Invitation management</h2></div></header><div className=\"card-kicker\">Version {voyage.versionLabel}</p><h3>{voyage.taleTitle}</h3><h4>{voyage.voyageName}</h4><dl><div><dt>Status</dt><dd>{voyage.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd></div><div><dt>Players</dt><dd>{voyage.players.map((player) props.setScheduleTimezone(event.target.value)} /></label></div>}\n+    {props.step === 2 && <div className=\"wizard-form\"><label><span>Use existing Player (optional)</span><select key={player.id} value={player.id}>{player.displayName}{player.username ? ` (${player.username})` : \"\"}</option>)}</select></label>{!props.existingPlayerId && <label><span>Player display Replacements generate new secrets.</p></div>}\n+    {props.step === 4 && <div className=\"delivery-options\"><article><strong>Secure link</strong><span>Opaque, high-entropy, single-recipient URL</span></article><article><strong>QR card</strong><span>Encodes the same secure link with a readable code fallback</span></article><article><strong>Short code</strong><span>Human-friendly, rate-limited gateway lookup</span></article><article><strong>Copyable message</strong><span>Player-safe invitation copy without hidden Tale details</span></article></div>}\n+    {props.step === 5 && <div className=\"review-sheet\"><p className=\"eyebrow\">Player-safe preview</p><h3>{props.selectedTale?.title}</h3><h4>{props.voyageName}</h4><dl><div><dt>Edition lock</dt><dd>{props.selectedVersion?.label}</dd></div><div><dt>Player</dt><dd>{props.recipientName}</dd></div><div><dt>Progression</dt><dd>{props.captainMode.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \").toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd></div><div><dt>Invitation expires</dt><dd>{props.expiresInHours} hours after creation</dd></div></dl><p className=\"panel-note\">Creation is atomic. The voyage remains bound to this immutable edition, including after newer editions are published.</p></div>}\n+    {props.step === 6 && (props.created.length ? <InvitationSecrets invitations={props.created} csrf={props.library.csrfToken} /> : <div className=\"platform-empty\"><h3>Ready to create</h3><p>The playthrough and invitation will be written together. No orphaned voyage is left if creation fails.</p></div>)}\n+  </div><footer>{props.step > 0 && props.step < 6 && <button onClick={() => props.setStep(props.step - 1)}>Back</button>}{props.step < 5 && <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={!canNext} onClick={() => props.setStep(props.step + 1)}>Continue</button>}{props.step === 5 && <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={props.busy || !canNext} onClick={props.createVoyage}>{props.busy ? \"Creating…\" : \"Create voyage and invitation\"}</button>}{props.step === 6 && props.created.length > 0 && <button className=\"brass-button\" onClick={props.close}>Done</button>}</footer></section></div>;\n+}\n+\n+function InvitationSecrets({ invitations, csrf }: { invitations: CreatedInvitation[]; csrf: string }) {\n+  async function copy(invitation: CreatedInvitation, value: string) {\n+    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);\n+    await fetch(`/api/captain/invitations/${invitation.id}`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf }, body: JSON.stringify({ action: \"copied\" }) });\n+  }\n+  return <div className=\"invitation-secrets\">{invitations.map((invitation) => <article key={invitation.id}><img src={invitation.qrCodeDataUrl} alt={`QR code for ${invitation.recipientName}. Short code ${invitation.shortCode}.`} /><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Shown once after creation</p><h3>{invitation.recipientName}</h3><code>{invitation.shortCode}</code><p>{invitation.message}</p><div><button onClick={() => void copy(invitation, invitation.link)}>Copy secure link</button><button onClick={() => void copy(invitation, invitation.message)}>Copy message</button></div><small>Expires {new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</small></div></article>)}</div>;\n+}\n*** Add File: C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt/src/app/captain/library/page.tsx\n+import { redirect } from \"next/navigation\";\n+import { CaptainLibrary } from \"@/components/platform/CaptainLibrary\";\n+import { requireGmCapability } from \"@/lib/security\";\n+\n+export const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n+export default async function CaptainLibraryPage() {\n+  if (!(await requireGmCapability(\"CAPTAIN\"))) redirect(\"/captain/sign-in?return=/captain/library\");\n+  return <CaptainLibrary />;\n+}\n*** Update File: C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt/src/app/captain/page.tsx\n@@\n-import { CaptainDashboard } from \"@/components/captain/CaptainDashboard\";\n+import { CaptainLibrary } from \"@/components/platform/CaptainLibrary\";\n import { requireGmCapability } from \"@/lib/security\";\n export const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n export default async function CaptainPage() {\n-  return <CaptainDashboard authenticated={Boolean(await requireGmCapability(\"CAPTAIN\"))} />;\n+  return <CaptainLibrary />;\n }\n*** Add File: C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt/src/app/captain/invitations/page.tsx\n+import { redirect } from \"next/navigation\";\n+\n+export default function CaptainInvitationsPage() {\n+  redirect(\"/captain/library?tab=invitations\");\n+}\n*** End Patch";

versionId: string; updatedAt: string };\n+  tale: { title: string; subtitle: string | null; shortDescription: string | null };\n+  chapter: { title: string } | null;\n+  block: { title: string; blockType: string; configuration: Record<string, unknown> } | null;\n+  assets: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string }>;\n+  events: Array<{ sequence: number; eventType: string }>;\n+};\n+\n+export function PlayerSafePreview({ playthroughId }: { playthroughId: string }) {\n+  const [preview, setPreview] = useState<Preview | null>(null);\n+  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n+  useEffect(() => { void fetch(`/api/captain/playthroughs/${playthroughId}/preview`, { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => { const body = (await response.json()) as { preview?: Preview; error?: string }; if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Preview unavailable.\"); else setPreview(body.preview ?? null); }); }, [playthroughId]);\n+  if (error) return <main className=\"player-safe-preview platform-loading\"><p role=\"alert\" className=\"platform-error\">{error}</p></main>;\n+  if (!preview) return <main className=\"player-safe-preview platform-loading\"><p role=\"status\">Projecting the Player-safe view…</p></main>;\n+  return <main className=\"player-safe-preview\"><header><Link href=\"/captain/library\">Back to Captain&apos;s Command</Link><p className=\"eyebrow\">Non-mutating Player preview</p><h1>{preview.tale.title}</h1><p>This projection uses the real Player field and asset policy. (!leftRow || !rightRow) throw new Error(\"Choose two published versions from this Tall Tale.\");\n+  const left = JSON.parse(leftRow.contentSnapshot) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\n+  const right = string, before?: unknown, after?: unknown) =>\n+    changes.push({\n+      type,\n+      path,\n+      ...(before === undefined ? {} : { before: typeof before === \"string\" ? before : JSON.stringify(before) }),\n+      ...(after === undefined ? {} : { after: typeof after === \"string\" ? after : JSON.stringify(after) }),\n+    });\n+  for (const key of [\"title\", \"subtitle\", \"shortDescription\", \"longDescription\", \"theme\", \"visibility\"] as const)\n+    if (left.tale[key] !== right.tale[key])\n+      record(key === \"title\" ? \"renamed\" : key === \"visibility\" ? \"access-scope-changed\" : \"modified\", `tale.${key}`, left.tale[key], right.tale[key]);\n+  const leftChapters = new Map(left.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, chapter]));\n+  const rightChapters = new Map(right.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, chapter]));\n+  for (const [id, chapter] of leftChapters) if (!rightChapters.has(id)) record(\"removed\", `chapters.${id}`, chapter.title);\n+  for (const [id, chapter] of rightChapters) if (!leftChapters.has(id)) record(\"added\", `chapters.${id}`, undefined, chapter.title);\n+  for (const [id, before] of leftChapters) {\n+    const after = rightChapters.get(id);\n+    if (!after) continue;\n+    if (before.title !== after.title) record(\"renamed\", `chapters.${id}.title`, before.title, after.title);\n+    if (before.orderIndex !== after.orderIndex) record(\"moved\", `chapters.${id}.orderIndex`, before.orderIndex, after.orderIndex);\n+    const beforeBlocks = new Map(before.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, block]));\n+    const afterBlocks = new Map(after.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, block]));\n+    for (const [blockId, block] of beforeBlocks)\n+      if (!afterBlocks.has(blockId)) record(\"removed\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}`, block.title);\n+    for (const [blockId, block] of afterBlocks)\n+      if (!beforeBlocks.has(blockId)) record(\"added\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}`, undefined, block.title);\n+    for (const [blockId, beforeBlock] of beforeBlocks) {\n+      const afterBlock = afterBlocks.get(blockId);\n+      if (!afterBlock) continue;\n+      if (beforeBlock.title !== afterBlock.title)\n+        record(\"renamed\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.title`, beforeBlock.title, afterBlock.title);\n+      if (beforeBlock.orderIndex !== afterBlock.orderIndex)\n+        record(\"moved\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.orderIndex`, beforeBlock.orderIndex, afterBlock.orderIndex);\n+      for (const key of [\"blockType\", \"configuration\", \"presentation\", \"completion\", \"nextBlockId\"] as const)\n+        if (JSON.stringify(beforeBlock[key]) !== JSON.stringify(afterBlock[key]))\n+          record(\"modified\", `chapters.${id}.blocks.${blockId}.${key}`, beforeBlock[key], afterBlock[key]);\n+    }\n+  }\n+  const leftAssets = new Map(left.assets.map((asset) => [asset.id, asset]));\n+  const rightAssets = new Map(right.assets.map((asset) => [asset.id, asset]));\n+  for (const [id, asset] of leftAssets) if (!rightAssets.has(id)) record(\"removed\", `assets.${id}`, asset.displayName);\n+  for (const [id, asset] of rightAssets) if (!leftAssets.has(id)) record(\"added\", `assets.${id}`, undefined, asset.displayName);\n+  for (const [id, before] of leftAssets) {\n+    const after = rightAssets.get(id);\n+    if (after && JSON.stringify(before.roles) !== JSON.stringify(after.roles))\n+      record(\"access-scope-changed\", `assets.${id}.roles`, before.roles, after.roles);\n+  }\n+  const activeSessions = await db.taleSession.count({\n+    where: { publishedVersionId: leftVersionId, status: { in: [\"INVITING\", \"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PAUSED\"] } },\n+  });\n+  const compatibilityWarnings = changes\n+    .filter((change) => [\"removed\", \"access-scope-changed\"].includes(change.type))\n+    .map((change) => `${change.type}: ${change.path}`);\n+  return {\n+    left: { id: leftRow.id, label: leftRow.versionLabel, checksum: leftRow.checksum },\n+    right: { id: rightRow.id, label: rightRow.versionLabel, checksum: rightRow.checksum },\n+    changes,\n+    summary: changes.reduce<Record<string, number>>((summary, change) => {\n+      summary[change.type] = (summary[change.type] ?? 0) + 1;\n+      return summary;\n+    }, {}),\n+    activeSessionsOnLeft: activeSessions,\n+    compatibilityWarnings,\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function forkPublishedVersion(taleId: string, versionId: string, creatorId: string) {\n+  const version = await db.publishedTaleVersion.findFirstOrThrow({ where: { id: versionId, taleId } });\n+  const snapshot = JSON.parse(version.contentSnapshot) as PublishedTaleSnapshot;\n+  let slug = slugify(`${snapshot.tale.slug}-fork`);\n+  let suffix = 2;\n+  const base = slug;\n+  while (await db.tallTale.findUnique({ where: { slug }, select: { id: true } })) slug = `${base}-${suffix++}`;\n+  const created = await createStudioTale({\n+    title: `${snapshot.tale.title} Fork`,\n+    slug,\n+    subtitle: snapshot.tale.subtitle ?? undefined,\n+    shortDescription: snapshot.tale.shortDescription ?? undefined,\n+    longDescription: snapshot.tale.longDescription ?? undefined,\n+    theme: snapshot.tale.theme,\n+    visibility: \"PRIVATE\",\n+    playerCountMin: snapshot.tale.playerCountMin,\n+    playerCountMax: snapshot.tale.playerCountMax,\n+    estimatedDuration: snapshot.tale.estimatedDuration ?? undefined,\n+    initialChapterTitle: snapshot.chapters[0]?.title ?? \"Chapter One\",\n+    creatorId,\n+  });\n+  await db.tallTale.update({\n+    where: { id: created.id },\n+    data: { forkedFromTaleId: taleId, forkedFromVersionId: versionId },\n+  });\n+  const target = await getStudioTale(created.id);\n+  const chapterIds = new Map(snapshot.chapters.map((chapter) => [chapter.id, crypto.randomUUID()]));\n+  const blockIds = new Map(\n+    snapshot.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks.map((block) => [block.id, crypto.randomUUID()] as const)),\n+  );\n+  const remap = (value: unknown) => (typeof value === \"string\" && blockIds.has(value) ? blockIds.get(value) : value);\n+  await saveStudioDraft(\n+    created.id,\n+    {\n+      autosaveVersion: target.draft.autosaveVersion,\n+      tale: { ...snapshot.tale, title: `${snapshot.tale.title} Fork`, slug, visibility: \"PRIVATE\" },\n+      chapters: snapshot.chapters.map((chapter) => ({\n+        ...chapter,\n+        id: chapterIds.get(chapter.id)!,\n+        blocks: chapter.blocks.map((block) => ({\n+          ...block,\n+          id: blockIds.get(block.id)!,\n+          configuration: {\n+            ...block.configuration,\n+            successTargetBlockId: remap(block.configuration.successTargetBlockId),\n+            failureTargetBlockId: remap(block.configuration.failureTargetBlockId),\n+            choices: Array.isArray(block.configuration.choices)\n+              ? block.configuration.choices.map((choice) =>\n+                  choice && typeof choice === \"object\" && !Array.isArray(choice)\n+                    ? { ...choice, targetBlockId: remap(choice.targetBlockId) }\n+                    : choice,\n+                )\n+              : block.configuration.choices,\n+          },\n+        })),\n+      })),\n+    },\n+    creatorId,\n+  );\n+  return { id: created.id, slug, forkedFromTaleId: taleId, forkedFromVersionId: versionId };\n+}\n*** End Patch";

\"DECLINED\" | \"CONFLICT\",\r\n  ) {\r\n    super(message);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport const normalizeShortCode = (value: string) => value.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g, \"\");\r\nexport const invitationCredentialForCode = (value: string) => `code:${normalizeShortCode(value)}`;\r\n\r\nfunction makeShortCode() {\r\n  const bytes = randomBytes(8);\r\n  const raw = Array.from(bytes, (value) => alphabet[value % alphabet.length]).join(\"\");\r\n  return `${raw.slice(0, 4)}-${raw.slice(4)}`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst invitationWhere = (credential: string) => {\r\n  if (credential.startsWith(\"code:\")) return { shortCodeHash: hashToken(credential.slice(5)) };\r\n  return { tokenHash: hashToken(credential) };\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst activeInvitationStates = [\"CREATED\", \"SENT\", \"COPIED\", \"VIEWED\"];\r\n\r\nasync function getInvitation(credential: string) {\r\n  return db.invitation.findFirst({\r\n    where: invitationWhere(credential),\r\n    include: {\r\n      intendedPlayer: true,\r\n      replacement: { select: { id: true } },\r\n      playthrough: { include: { tale: true, version: true, memberships: true } },\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction unavailableCode(invitation: NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getInvitation>>>) {\r\n  if (invitation.expiresAt.getTime() <= Date.now()) return \"EXPIRED\" as const;\r\n  if (invitation.status === \"REVOKED\") return \"REVOKED\" as const;\r\n  if (invitation.status === \"REPLACED\") return \"REPLACED\" as const;\r\n  if ([\"ACCEPTED\", \"READY\", \"JOINED\", \"CONSUMED\"].includes(invitation.status)) return \"CONSUMED\" as const;\r\n  if (invitation.status === \"DECLINED\") return \"DECLINED\" as const;\r\n  return \"INVALID\" as const;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction publicInvitationView(invitation: NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getInvitation>>>) {\r\n  const snapshot = invitation.playthrough.version\r\n    ? parsePublishedSnapshot(invitation.playthrough.version.contentSnapshot)\r\n    : null;\r\n  const safeStatus = invitationUsable(\r\n    invitation.status,\r\n    invitation.expiresAt,\r\n    invitation.redemptionCount,\r\n    invitation.maxRedemptions,\r\n  )\r\n    ? invitation.status\r\n    : unavailableCode(invitation);\r\n  return {\r\n    id: invitation.id,\r\n    status: safeStatus,\r\n    recipientName: invitation.recipientName,\r\n    expiresAt: invitation.expiresAt.toISOString(),\r\n    requiresPin: Boolean(invitation.pinHash),\r\n    playthrough: {\r\n      id: invitation.playthrough.id,\r\n      voyageName: invitation.playthrough.voyageName ?? invitation.playthrough.ownerLabel ?? \"Tall Tale voyage\",\r\n      status: invitation.playthrough.status,\r\n      plannedStartAt: invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt?.toISOString() ?? null,\r\n      scheduleTimezone: invitation.playthrough.scheduleTimezone,\r\n      tale: snapshot\r\n        ? {\r\n            title: snapshot.tale.title,\r\n            subtitle: snapshot.tale.subtitle,\r\n            shortDescription: snapshot.tale.shortDescription,\r\n            coverUrl: snapshot.tale.coverAssetId\r\n              ? `/api/media/${snapshot.tale.coverAssetId}?variant=PREVIEW&version=${encodeURIComponent(\r\n                  invitation.playthrough.publishedVersionId ?? \"\",\r\n                )}&invitation=${encodeURIComponent(invitation.id)}`\r\n              : null,\r\n          }\r\n        : null,\r\n      versionLabel: invitation.playthrough.version?.versionLabel ?? null,\r\n    },\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function resolveInvitation(credential: string, markViewed = true) {\r\n  const invitation = await getInvitation(credential);\r\n  if (!invitation) throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"This invitation is not available.\", \"INVALID\");\r\n  if (invitation.expiresAt.getTime() <= Date.now() && activeInvitationStates.includes(invitation.status)) {\r\n    await db.$transaction([\r\n      db.invitation.update({ where: { id: invitation.id }, data: { status: \"EXPIRED\", lastValidatedAt: new Date() } }),\r\n      db.invitationEvent.create({\r\n        data: { invitationId: invitation.id, eventType: \"EXPIRED\", actorType: \"SYSTEM\", metadata: \"{}\" },\r\n      }),\r\n    ]);\r\n    invitation.status = \"EXPIRED\";\r\n  } else if (markViewed && activeInvitationStates.includes(invitation.status)) {\r\n    const now = new Date();\r\n    await db.$transaction([\r\n      db.invitation.update({\r\n        where: { id: invitation.id },\r\n        data: { status: \"VIEWED\", viewedAt: invitation.viewedAt ?? now, lastValidatedAt: now },\r\n      }),\r\n      db.invitationEvent.create({\r\n        data: { invitationId: invitation.id, eventType: \"VIEWED\", actorType: \"ANONYMOUS\", metadata: \"{}\" },\r\n      }),\r\n    ]);\r\n    invitation.status = \"VIEWED\";\r\n    invitation.viewedAt ??= now;\r\n  }\r\n  return publicInvitationView(invitation);\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function createPlaythroughAndInvitations(\r\n  unchecked: CreatePlaythroughInput,\r\n  captainId: string,\r\n  baseUrl: string,\r\n) {\r\n  const input = createPlaythroughSchema.parse(unchecked);\r\n  const version = await db.publishedTaleVersion.findFirst({\r\n    where: { id: input.versionId, taleId: input.taleId },\r\n    include: { tale: true },\r\n  });\r\n  if (!version) throw new Error(\"Choose a published Tall Tale version before creating a voyage.\");\r\n  const snapshot = parsePublishedSnapshot(version.contentSnapshot);\r\n  if (!snapshot.chapters.some((chapter) => chapter.blocks.length))\r\n    throw new Error(\"This published version has no playable Player content.\");\r\n  const secrets = await Promise.all(\r\n    input.players.map(async (player) => {\r\n      const token = makeToken(36);\r\n      const shortCode = makeShortCode();\r\n      return {\r\n        player,\r\n        token,\r\n        shortCode,\r\n        pinHash: player.pin ? await hash(player.pin, 12) : null,\r\n      };\r\n    }),\r\n  );\r\n  const correlationId = randomUUID();\r\n  const playthrough = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\r\n    const created = await tx.taleSession.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        taleId: input.taleId,\r\n        publishedVersionId: version.id,\r\n        ownerLabel: input.players.map((player) => player.displayName).join(\", \"),\r\n        voyageName: input.voyageName,\r\n        captainId,\r\n        accessTokenHash: hashToken(makeToken()),\r\n        status: input.plannedStartAt ? \"SCHEDULED\" : \"INVITING\",\r\n        captainMode: input.progressionMode ?? input.captainMode,\r\n        configuration: JSON.stringify({\r\n          hints: input.hints,\r\n          sideQuests: input.sideQuests,\r\n          startingBlockId: input.startingBlockId,\r\n          testVoyage: input.testVoyage,\r\n          accountRequired: input.accountRequired,\r\n          accessibilityDefaults: input.accessibilityDefaults,\r\n        }),\r\n        plannedStartAt: input.plannedStartAt ? new Date(input.plannedStartAt) : null,\r\n        scheduleTimezone: input.scheduleTimezone ?? null,\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    for (const secret of secrets) {\r\n      const player = secret.player.playerId\r\n        ? await tx.playerProfile.findFirstOrThrow({\r\n            where: { id: secret.player.playerId, status: \"ACTIVE\" },\r\n          })\r\n        : await tx.playerProfile.create({ data: { displayName: secret.player.displayName } });\r\n      await tx.playthroughMembership.create({\r\n        data: {\r\n          playthroughId: created.id,\r\n          playerProfileId: player.id,\r\n          status: \"INVITED\",\r\n          crewRole: secret.player.crewRole ?? null,\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n      const invitation = await tx.invitation.create({\r\n        data: {\r\n          playthroughId: created.id,\r\n          intendedPlayerId: player.id,\r\n          tokenHash: hashToken(secret.token),\r\n          tokenPrefix: secret.token.slice(0, 8),\r\n          shortCodeHash: hashToken(normalizeShortCode(secret.shortCode)),\r\n          shortCodePrefix: normalizeShortCode(secret.shortCode).slice(0, 4),\r\n          pinHash: secret.pinHash,\r\n          recipientName: secret.player.displayName,\r\n          deliveryMethods: JSON.stringify([\"SECURE_LINK\", \"QR_CODE\", \"SHORT_CODE\", \"COPYABLE_MESSAGE\"]),\r\n          expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + input.expiresInHours * 60 * 60 * 1000),\r\n          maxRedemptions: input.maxRedemptions,\r\n          createdBy: captainId,\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n      await tx.invitationEvent.create({\r\n        data: {\r\n          invitationId: invitation.id,\r\n          eventType: \"CREATED\",\r\n          actorType: \"CAPTAIN\",\r\n          actorId: captainId,\r\n          metadata: JSON.stringify({ versionLabel: version.versionLabel }),\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n      Object.assign(secret, { invitationId: invitation.id, playerId: player.id });\r\n    }\r\n    await tx.platformAuditEvent.create({\r\n      data: {\r\n        actorType: \"CAPTAIN\",\r\n        actorId: captainId,\r\n        action: \"PLAYTHROUGH_CREATED\",\r\n        resourceType: \"PLAYTHROUGH\",\r\n        resourceId: created.id,\r\n        correlationId,\r\n        metadata: JSON.stringify(\r\n          safeAuditMetadata({ versionId: version.id, versionLabel: version.versionLabel, playerCount: input.players.length }),\r\n        ),\r\n      },\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

MembershipState = (typeof MEMBERSHIP_STATES)[number];\r\n\r\nconst membershipTransitions: Record<MembershipState, MembershipState[]> = {\r\n  INVITED: [\"ACCEPTED\", \"DECLINED\", \"REMOVED\", \"SUSPENDED\"],\r\n  ACCEPTED: [\"READY\", \"REMOVED\", \"SUSPENDED\"],\r\n  READY: [\"ACTIVE_MEMBER\", \"REMOVED\", \"SUSPENDED\"],\r\n  ACTIVE_MEMBER: [\"COMPLETED_MEMBER\", \"REMOVED\", \"REPLACED\",\r\n] as const;\r\n\r\nexport type InvitationState = (typeof INVITATION_STATES)[number];\r\n\r\nexport function canTransitionPlaythrough(from: string, to: PlaythroughState) {\r\n  return PLAYTHROUGH_STATES.includes(from as PlaythroughState)\r\n    ? playthroughTransitions[from as PlaythroughState].includes(to)\r\n    : false;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function canTransitionMembership(from: function assertPlaythroughTransition(from: string, to: PlaythroughState) {\r\n  if (!canTransitionPlaythrough(from, to)) throw new Error(`A playthrough cannot transition from ${from} to ${to}.`);\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function assertMembershipTransition(from: string, to: MembershipState) {\r\n  if (!canTransitionMembership(from, to)) throw new Error(`A membership cannot transition from
