};\r\ntype Library = {\r\n  csrfToken: string;\r\n  groups: { needsAttention: Voyage[]; activeVoyages: Voyage[]; readyToLaunch: Voyage[]; completedPlaythroughs: Voyage[] };\r\n  invitations: Invitation[];\r\n  publishedTales: Tale[];\r\n  playerProfiles: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string; username: string | null }>;\r\n  serverTime: string;\r\n};\r\ntype CreatedInvitation = { id: string; recipientName: string; link: string; shortCode: string; qrCodeDataUrl: string; message: string; expiresAt: string };\r\n\r\nconst steps = [\"Select Tale\", \"Configure Voyage\", \"Add Players\", \"Security\", \"Delivery\", \"Review\", \"Create\"];\r\n\r\nexport function CaptainLibrary() {\r\n  const [library, setLibrary] = useState<Library | null>(null);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [tab, setTab] = useState<\"voyages\" | \"invitations\" | \"published\">(\"voyages\");\r\n  const [wizard, setWizard] = useState(false);\r\n  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);\r\n  const [taleId, setTaleId] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [versionId, setVersionId] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [voyageName, setVoyageName] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [captainMode, setCaptainMode] = useState(\"CAPTAIN_CONTROLLED\");\r\n  const [hints, setHints] = useState(\"ON_REQUEST\");\r\n  const [sideQuests, setSideQuests] = useState(true);\r\n  const [plannedStartAt, setPlannedStartAt] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [scheduleTimezone, setScheduleTimezone] = useState(Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone);\r\n  const [existingPlayerId, setExistingPlayerId] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [playerName, setPlayerName] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [crewRole, setCrewRole] = useState(\"Player\");\r\n  const [pin, setPin] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [expiresInHours, setExpiresInHours] = useState(168);\r\n  const [accountRequired, setAccountRequired] = useState(false);\r\n  const [created, setCreated] = useState<CreatedInvitation[]>([]);\r\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/captain/library\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as Library & { error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Captain's library is unavailable.\");\r\n    else { setLibrary(body); setError(\"\"); }\r\n  }, []);\r\n  useEffect(() => { queueMicrotask(() => void load()); const timer = setInterval(() => void load(), 5000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, [load]);\r\n\r\n  const selectedTale = library?.publishedTales.find((tale) => tale.id === taleId);\r\n  const selectedVersion = selectedTale?.versions.find((version) => version.id === versionId);\r\n  const selectedExistingPlayer = library?.playerProfiles.find((player) => player.id === existingPlayerId);\r\n  const recipientName = selectedExistingPlayer?.displayName ?? playerName;\r\n\r\n  function chooseTale(id: string) {\r\n    setTaleId(id);\r\n    const tale = library?.publishedTales.find((item) => item.id === id);\r\n    setVersionId(tale?.versions[0]?.id ?? \"\");\r\n    if (!voyageName && tale) setVoyageName(`${recipientName || \"New Player\"} Â· ${tale.title}`);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function createVoyage() {\r\n    if (!library || !recipientName) return;\r\n    setBusy(true); setError(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/captain/playthroughs\", {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": library.csrfToken },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({\r\n        taleId, versionId, voyageName, captainMode, hints, sideQuests,\r\n        plannedStartAt: plannedStartAt ? new Date(plannedStartAt).toISOString() : null,\r\n        scheduleTimezone: plannedStartAt ? scheduleTimezone : null,\r\n        expiresInHours, accountRequired, maxRedemptions: 1,\r\n        accessibilityDefaults: {}, testVoyage: false,\r\n        players: [{ ...(existingPlayerId ? { playerId: existingPlayerId } : {}), displayName: recipientName, crewRole, ...(pin ? { pin } : {}) }],\r\n      }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { invitations?: CreatedInvitation[]; error?: string };\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"Voyage creation failed.\");\r\n    setCreated(body.invitations ?? []); setStep(6); await load();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function launch(voyage: Voyage) {\r\n    if (!library || !window.confirm(`Launch â€œ${voyage.voyageName}â€ for its ready Players?`)) return;\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/playthroughs/${voyage.id}/launch`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": library.csrfToken }, body: \"{}\",\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string };\r\n    setBusy(false); if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Launch failed.\"); await load();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function invitationAction(invitation: Invitation, action: \"extend\" | \"revoke\" | \"replace\") {\r\n    if (!library) return;\r\n    if ([\"revoke\", \"replace\"].includes(action) && !window.confirm(`${action === \"revoke\" ? \"Revoke\" : \"Replace\"} the invitation for ${invitation.recipientName}?`)) return;\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/invitations/${invitation.id}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": library.csrfToken },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action, extendHours: 168 }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; replacement?: CreatedInvitation };\r\n    setBusy(false); if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Invitation action failed.\");\r\n    else if (body.replacement) setCreated([body.replacement]);\r\n    await load();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!library) return <main className=\"captain-library platform-loading\"><p role={error ? \"alert\" : \"status\"} className={error ? \"platform-error\" : \"\"}>{error || \"Opening Captain's Commandâ€¦\"}</p><Link href=\"/captain/sign-in\">Captain sign-in</Link></main>;\r\n  const voyageGroups: Array<[string, Voyage[]]> = [[\"Needs Attention\", library.groups.needsAttention], [\"Active Voyages\", library.groups.activeVoyages], [\"Ready to Launch\", library.groups.readyToLaunch], [\"Completed Playthroughs\", library.groups.completedPlaythroughs]];\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"captain-library\">\r\n      <header className=\"platform-header\"><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Operational command</p><h1>Captain&apos;s Tall Tale Library</h1><p>Run live voyages, invite Players, and keep authoring controls safely in Studio.</p></div><div><Link href=\"/studio/library\">Switch to Creator workspace</Link><button className=\"brass-button\" onClick={() => { setWizard(true); setStep(0); }}>Start New Voyage</button></div></header>\r\n      <nav className=\"platform-tabs\" aria-label=\"Captain library sections\"><button className={tab === \"voyages\" ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setTab(\"voyages\")}>Voyages</button><button className={tab === \"invitations\" ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setTab(\"invitations\")}>Invitations <span>{library.invitations.filter((item) => [\"CREATED\", \"COPIED\", \"VIEWED\"].includes(item.status)).length}</span></button><button className={tab === \"published\" ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setTab(\"published\")}>Published Tales</button></nav>\r\n      {error && <p className=\"platform-error captain-banner\" role=\"alert\">{error}</p>}\r\n      {tab === \"voyages\" && <div className=\"captain-groups\">{voyageGroups.map(([label, voyages]) => voyages.length > 0 && <section key={label}><header><h2>{label}</h2><span>{voyages.length}</span></header><div className=\"captain-card-grid\">{voyages.map((voyage) => <VoyageCard key={`${label}-${voyage.id}`} voyage={voyage} busy={busy} launch={() => void launch(voyage)} />)}</div></section>)}</div>}\r\n      {tab === \"invitations\" && <section className=\"invitation-dashboard\"><header><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Tracked security objects</p><h2>Invitation management</h2></div></header><div className=\"invitation-table\" role=\"table\">{library.invitations.map((invitation) => <article key={invitation.id} role=\"row\"><div><strong>{invitation.recipientName}</strong><span>{invitation.taleTitle} Â· {invitation.voyageName}</span></div><div><b className={`status-pill status-${invitation.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}`}>{invitation.status}</b><small>token {invitation.tokenPrefix}â€¦ Â· code {invitation.shortCodePrefix}â€¦</small></div><div><time>{new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</time><small>{invitation.viewedAt ? `Viewed ${new Date(invitation.viewedAt).toLocaleString()}` : \"Not viewed\"}</small></div><div className=\"row-actions\">{[\"CREATED\", \"SENT\", \"COPIED\", \"VIEWED\"].includes(invitation.status) && <><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"extend\")}>Extend</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"replace\")}>Replace</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"revoke\")}>Revoke</button></>}</div></article>)}</div></section>}\r\n      {tab === \"published\" && <section className=\"published-tale-grid\">{library.publishedTales.map((tale) => <article key={tale.id}><p className=\"card-kicker\">{tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()}</p><h2>{tale.title}</h2><p>{tale.subtitle}</p><ul>{tale.versions.map((version) => <li key={version.id}><span>Version {version.label}</span><small>{version.activeRunCount} runs Â· {new Date(version.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</small></li>)}</ul><button onClick={() => { chooseTale(tale.id); setWizard(true); setStep(1); }}>Invite Players</button><Link href={`/captain/tales/${tale.id}`}>Open details</Link></article>)}</section>}\r\n      {created.length > 0 && !wizard && <InvitationSecrets invitations={created} csrf={library.csrfToken} />}\r\n      {wizard && <VoyageWizard step={step} setStep={setStep} close={() => setWizard(false)} library={library} taleId={taleId} chooseTale={chooseTale} versionId={versionId} setVersionId={setVersionId} selectedTale={selectedTale} selectedVersion={selectedVersion} voyageName={voyageName} setVoyageName={setVoyageName} captainMode={captainMode} setCaptainMode={setCaptainMode} hints={hints} setHints={setHints} sideQuests={sideQuests} setSideQuests={setSideQuests} plannedStartAt={plannedStartAt} setPlannedStartAt={setPlannedStartAt} scheduleTimezone={scheduleTimezone} setScheduleTimezone={setScheduleTimezone} existingPlayerId={existingPlayerId} setExistingPlayerId={setExistingPlayerId} playerName={playerName} setPlayerName={setPlayerName} crewRole={crewRole} setCrewRole={setCrewRole} pin={pin} setPin={setPin} expiresInHours={expiresInHours} setExpiresInHours={setExpiresInHours} accountRequired={accountRequired} setAccountRequired={setAccountRequired} recipientName={recipientName} created={created} busy={busy} createVoyage={() => void createVoyage()} />}\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction VoyageCard({ voyage, busy, launch }: { voyage: Voyage; busy: boolean; launch: () => void }) {\r\n  return <article className=\"captain-voyage-card\"><div className=\"session-signal\"><i className={voyage.connected ? \"connected\" : \"quiet\"} /><span>{voyage.connected ? \"Player recently connected\" : \"No recent heartbeat\"}</span></div><p className=\"card-kicker\">Version {voyage.versionLabel}</p><h3>{voyage.taleTitle}</h3><h4>{voyage.voyageName}</h4><dl><div><dt>Status</dt><dd>{voyage.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd></div><div><dt>Players</dt><dd>{voyage.players.map((player) => `${player.displayName} (${player.status.toLocaleLowerCase()})`).join(\", \") || \"No Players\"}</dd></div><div><dt>Last activity</dt><dd>{new Date(voyage.lastActivityAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</dd></div>{voyage.pendingAction && <div><dt>Needs action</dt><dd>{voyage.pendingAction}</dd></div>}</dl><div className=\"card-actions\"><Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/captain/sessions/${voyage.id}`}>Open Captain console</Link><Link href={`/captain/voyages/${voyage.id}/player-preview`}>Preview as Player</Link>{[\"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\"].includes(voyage.status) && <button disabled={busy} onClick={launch}>Launch voyage</button>}</div></article>;\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype WizardProps = Record<string, unknown> & { step: number; setStep: (step: number) => void; close: () => void; library: Library; taleId: string; chooseTale: (id: string) => void; versionId: string; setVersionId: (id: string) => void; selectedTale?: Tale; selectedVersion?: Tale[\"versions\"][number]; voyageName: string; setVoyageName: (value: string) => void; captainMode: string; setCaptainMode: (value: string) => void; hints: string; setHints: (value: string) => void; sideQuests: boolean; setSideQuests: (value: boolean) => void; plannedStartAt: string; setPlannedStartAt: (value: string) => void; scheduleTimezone: string; setScheduleTimezone: (value: string) => void; existingPlayerId: string; setExistingPlayerId: (value: string) => void; playerName: string; setPlayerName: (value: string) => void; crewRole: string; setCrewRole: (value: string) => void; pin: string; setPin: (value: string) => void; expiresInHours: number; setExpiresInHours: (value: number) => void; accountRequired: boolean; setAccountRequired: (value: boolean) => void; recipientName: string; created: CreatedInvitation[]; busy: boolean; createVoyage: () => void };\r\nfunction VoyageWizard(props: WizardProps) {\r\n  const canNext = [Boolean(props.taleId && props.versionId), props.voyageName.length >= 3, Boolean(props.recipientName), true, true, true, true][props.step];\r\n  return <div className=\"wizard-backdrop\" role=\"presentation\"><section className=\"voyage-wizard\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"wizard-title\"><header><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Step {props.step + 1} of 7</p><h2 id=\"wizard-title\">{steps[props.step]}</h2></div><button aria-label=\"Close invitation wizard\" onClick={props.close}>Ã—</button></header><ol className=\"wizard-progress\">{steps.map((label, index) => <li className={index <= props.step ? \"active\" : \"\"} key={label}><span>{index + 1}</span><small>{label}</small></li>)}</ol><div className=\"wizard-body\">\r\n    {props.step === 0 && <div className=\"wizard-choice-grid\">{props.library.publishedTales.map((tale) => <button className={props.taleId === tale.id ? \"selected\" : \"\"} onClick={() => props.chooseTale(tale.id)} key={tale.id}><strong>{tale.title}</strong><span>{tale.versions.length} published {tale.versions.length === 1 ? \"edition\" : \"editions\"}</span></button>)}{props.selectedTale && <label><span>Published version</span><select value={props.versionId} onChange={(event) => props.setVersionId(event.target.value)}>{props.selectedTale.versions.map((version) => <option key={version.id} value={version.id}>Version {version.label} Â· {new Date(version.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString()}</option>)}</select></label>}</div>}\r\n    {props.step === 1 && <div className=\"wizard-form\"><label><span>Voyage name</span><input value={props.voyageName} onChange={(event) => props.setVoyageName(event.target.value)} /></label><label><span>Progression mode</span><select value={props.captainMode} onChange={(event) => props.setCaptainMode(event.target.value)}><option value=\"CAPTAIN_CONTROLLED\">Captain-controlled</option><option value=\"RULE_CONTROLLED\">Rule-controlled</option><option value=\"HYBRID\">Hybrid</option></select></label><label><span>Hints</span><select value={props.hints} onChange={(event) => props.setHints(event.target.value)}><option value=\"DISABLED\">Disabled</option><option value=\"ON_REQUEST\">On request</option><option value=\"CAPTAIN_PUSHED\">Captain-pushed</option><option value=\"TIMED\">Timed</option><option value=\"TALE_DEFINED\">Tale-defined</option></select></label><label className=\"check-field\"><input type=\"checkbox\" checked={props.sideQuests} onChange={(event) => props.setSideQuests(event.target.checked)} /> Enable published side quests</label><label><span>Planned start (optional)</span><input type=\"datetime-local\" value={props.plannedStartAt} onChange={(event) => props.setPlannedStartAt(event.target.value)} /></label><label><span>Schedule timezone</span><input value={props.scheduleTimezone} onChange={(event) => props.setScheduleTimezone(event.target.value)} /></label></div>}\r\n    {props.step === 2 && <div className=\"wizard-form\"><label><span>Use existing Player (optional)</span><select value={props.existingPlayerId} onChange={(event) => props.setExistingPlayerId(event.target.value)}><option value=\"\">Create guest profile</option>{props.library.playerProfiles.map((player) => <option key={player.id} value={player.id}>{player.displayName}{player.username ? ` (${player.username})` : \"\"}</option>)}</select></label>{!props.existingPlayerId && <label><span>Player display name</span><input value={props.playerName} onChange={(event) => props.setPlayerName(event.target.value)} /></label>}<label><span>Crew role</span><input value={props.crewRole} onChange={(event) => props.setCrewRole(event.target.value)} /></label><p className=\"panel-note\">Crew invitations use individual secure identities. Additional crew members can be invited after this first vertical slice.</p></div>}\r\n    {props.step === 3 && <div className=\"wizard-form\"><label><span>Optional Player PIN</span><input type=\"password\" minLength={4} value={props.pin} onChange={(event) => props.setPin(event.target.value)} /></label><label><span>Invitation lifetime</span><select value={props.expiresInHours} onChange={(event) => props.setExpiresInHours(Number(event.target.value))}><option value={24}>24 hours</option><option value={168}>7 days</option><option value={720}>30 days</option></select></label><label className=\"check-field\"><input type=\"checkbox\" checked={props.accountRequired} onChange={(event) => props.setAccountRequired(event.target.checked)} /> Require a claimed Player account</label><p>No raw token, short code, or PIN will be stored. Replacements generate new secrets.</p></div>}\r\n    {props.step === 4 && <div className=\"delivery-options\"><article><strong>Secure link</strong><span>Opaque, high-entropy, single-recipient URL</span></article><article><strong>QR card</strong><span>Encodes the same secure link with a readable code fallback</span></article><article><strong>Short code</strong><span>Human-friendly, rate-limited gateway lookup</span></article><article><strong>Copyable message</strong><span>Player-safe invitation copy without hidden Tale details</span></article></div>}\r\n    {props.step === 5 && <div className=\"review-sheet\"><p className=\"eyebrow\">Player-safe preview</p><h3>{props.selectedTale?.title}</h3><h4>{props.voyageName}</h4><dl><div><dt>Edition lock</dt><dd>{props.selectedVersion?.label}</dd></div><div><dt>Player</dt><dd>{props.recipientName}</dd></div><div><dt>Progression</dt><dd>{props.captainMode.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \").toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd></div><div><dt>Invitation expires</dt><dd>{props.expiresInHours} hours after creation</dd></div></dl><p className=\"panel-note\">Creation is atomic. The voyage remains bound to this immutable edition, including after newer editions are published.</p></div>}\r\n    {props.step === 6 && (props.created.length ? <InvitationSecrets invitations={props.created} csrf={props.library.csrfToken} /> : <div className=\"platform-empty\"><h3>Ready to create</h3><p>The playthrough and invitation will be written together. No orphaned voyage is left if creation fails.</p></div>)}\r\n  </div><footer>{props.step > 0 && props.step < 6 && <button onClick={() => props.setStep(props.step - 1)}>Back</button>}{props.step < 5 && <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={!canNext} onClick={() => props.setStep(props.step + 1)}>Continue</button>}{props.step === 5 && <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={props.busy || !canNext} onClick={props.createVoyage}>{props.busy ? \"Creatingâ€¦\" : \"Create voyage and invitation\"}</button>}{props.step === 6 && props.created.length > 0 && <button className=\"brass-button\" onClick={props.close}>Done</button>}</footer></section></div>;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction InvitationSecrets({ invitations, csrf }: { invitations: CreatedInvitation[]; csrf: string }) {\r\n  async function copy(invitation: CreatedInvitation, value: string) {\r\n    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);\r\n    await fetch(`/api/captain/invitations/${invitation.id}`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf }, body: JSON.stringify({ action: \"copied\" }) });\r\n  }\r\n  return <div className=\"invitation-secrets\">{invitations.map((invitation) => <article key={invitation.id}><img src={invitation.qrCodeDataUrl} alt={`QR code for ${invitation.recipientName}. Short code ${invitation.shortCode}.`} /><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">Shown once after creation</p><h3>{invitation.recipientName}</h3><code>{invitation.shortCode}</code><p>{invitation.message}</p><div><button onClick={() => void copy(invitation, invitation.link)}>Copy secure link</button><button onClick={() => void copy(invitation, invitation.message)}>Copy message</button></div><small>Expires {new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</small></div></article>)}</div>;\r\n}\r\n        actorType: \"CAPTAIN\",\r\n        actorId: captainId,\r\n        action: \"PLAYTHROUGH_CREATED\",\r\n        resourceType: \"PLAYTHROUGH\",\r\n        resourceId: created.id,\r\n        correlationId,\r\n        metadata: JSON.stringify(\r\n          safeAuditMetadata({ versionId: version.id, versionLabel: version.versionLabel, playerCount: input.players.length }),\r\n        ),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    return created;\r\n  });\r\n  const origin = baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\r\n  return {\r\n    playthroughId: playthrough.id,\r\n    versionId: version.id,\r\n    versionLabel: version.versionLabel,\r\n    invitations: await Promise.all(\r\n      secrets.map(async (secret) => {\r\n        const link = `${origin}/join/${secret.token}`;\r\n        return {\r\n          id: String((secret as typeof secret & { invitationId: string }).invitationId),\r\n          recipientName: secret.player.displayName,\r\n          link,\r\n          shortCode: secret.shortCode,\r\n          qrCodeDataUrl: await QRCode.toDataURL(link, { errorCorrectionLevel: \"M\", margin: 2, width: 480 }),\r\n          message: `${secret.player.displayName}, your invitation to ${snapshot.tale.title} is ready. Open ${link} or enter code ${secret.shortCode}.`,\r\n          expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + input.expiresInHours * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),\r\n        };\r\n      }),\r\n    ),\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function acceptInvitation(\r\n  credential: string,\r\n  input: { pin?: string; displayName?: string },\r\n  signedInPlayerId?: string,\r\n) {\r\n  const invitation = await getInvitation(credential);\r\n  if (!invitation) throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"This invitation is not available.\", \"INVALID\");\r\n  if ([\"ACCEPTED\", \"READY\", \"JOINED\", \"CONSUMED\"].includes(invitation.status)) {\r\n    const existing = invitation.playthrough.memberships.find(\r\n      (membership) => membership.playerProfileId === invitation.intendedPlayerId,\r\n    );\r\n    if (existing) return { playerId: existing.playerProfileId, playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, idempotent: true };\r\n  }\r\n  if (!invitationUsable(invitation.status, invitation.expiresAt, invitation.redemptionCount, invitation.maxRedemptions))\r\n    throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"This invitation can no longer be accepted.\", unavailableCode(invitation));\r\n  if (invitation.pinHash && (!input.pin || !(await compare(input.pin, invitation.pinHash))))\r\n    throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"The invitation PIN was not accepted.\", \"INVALID\");\r\n  if (signedInPlayerId && invitation.intendedPlayerId && signedInPlayerId !== invitation.intendedPlayerId) {\r\n    const intended = invitation.intendedPlayer;\r\n    if (intended?.username || intended?.claimedAt)\r\n      throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"This invitation belongs to another Player profile.\", \"INVALID\");\r\n  }\r\n  const correlationId = randomUUID();\r\n  return db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\r\n    const claimed = await tx.invitation.updateMany({\r\n      where: {\r\n        id: invitation.id,\r\n        status: { in: activeInvitationStates },\r\n        redemptionCount: invitation.redemptionCount,\r\n        expiresAt: { gt: new Date() },\r\n      },\r\n      data: {\r\n        status: \"READY\",\r\n        acceptedAt: new Date(),\r\n        redemptionCount: { increment: 1 },\r\n        lastValidatedAt: new Date(),\r\n        ...(signedInPlayerId ? { intendedPlayerId: signedInPlayerId } : {}),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    if (!claimed.count) throw new InvitationUnavailableError(\"Invitation state changed. \"READY\",\r\n        joinedAt: new Date(),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    const remaining = await tx.invitation.count({\r\n      where: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, status: { in: correlationId,\r\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId }),\r\n      },\r\n    });\r\n    return { playerId, playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, idempotent: ]);\r\n    return { ok: true, expiresAt: expiresAt.toISOString() };\r\n  }\r\n  if (action === \"revoke\") {\r\n    if (!activeInvitationStates.includes(invitation.status)) throw new Error(\"Only a db.playthroughMembership.updateMany({\r\n        where: { playthroughId: invitation.playthroughId, playerProfileId: invitation.intendedPlayerId ?? undefined },\r\n        data: { status: \"REMOVED\", \"This invitation is not available.\");\r\n      setInvitation(body.invitation ?? null);\r\n      setCsrf(body.csrfToken ?? \"\");\r\n      setDisplayName(body.invitation?.recipientName ?? \"\");\r\n    });\r\n  }, [search]);\r\n\r\n  async function act(action: \"accept\" | \"decline\") {\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    setError(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/invitations/${action}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(action === \"accept\" ? { pin, displayName } : {}),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; playthroughId?: string };\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? `Unable to ${action} this invitation.`);\r\n    router.push(action === \"accept\" ? `/player/playthroughs/${body.playthroughId}` : \"/player/sign-in\");\r\n    router.refresh();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (error && !invitation)\r\n    return <main className=\"invitation-page\"><section className=\"invitation-sheet invalid\"><p className=\"eyebrow\">Invitation closed</p><h1>The seal will not open</h1><p role=\"alert\">{error}</p><Link href=\"/player/sign-in\">Return to Player entry</Link></section></main>;\r\n  if (!invitation) return <main className=\"invitation-page platform-loading\"><p role=\"status\">Inspecting the Captain&apos;s sealâ€¦</p></main>;\r\n  const tale = invitation.playthrough.tale;\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"invitation-page\">\r\n      <section className=\"invitation-sheet\" aria-labelledby=\"invitation-title\">\r\n        <div className=\"invitation-seal\" aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</div>\r\n        {tale?.coverUrl && <img className=\"invitation-cover\" src={tale.coverUrl} alt=\"\" />}\r\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">A Captain&apos;s invitation for {invitation.recipientName}</p>\r\n        <h1 id=\"invitation-title\">{tale?.title ?? \"A Tall Tale awaits\"}</h1>\r\n        <h2>{invitation.playthrough.voyageName}</h2>\r\n        <p>{tale?.shortDescription ?? \"Your voyage is ready to join.\"}</p>\r\n        <dl><div><dt>Edition</dt><dd>{invitation.playthrough.versionLabel}</dd></div><div><dt>Invitation expires</dt><dd>{new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</dd></div>{invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt && <div><dt>Planned start</dt><dd>{new Date(invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt).toLocaleString()} {invitation.playthrough.scheduleTimezone}</dd></div>}</dl>\r\n        <label><span>Your display name</span><input value={displayName} onChange={(event) => setDisplayName(event.target.value)} required /></label>\r\n        {invitation.requiresPin && <label><span>Invitation PIN</span><input type=\"password\" inputMode=\"numeric\" autoComplete=\"one-time-code\" value={pin} onChange={(event) => setPin(event.target.value)} required /></label>}\r\n        {error && <p className=\"platform-error\" role=\"alert\">{error}</p>}\r\n        <div className=\"invitation-actions\"><button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy || !displayName || (invitation.requiresPin && !pin)} onClick={() => void act(\"accept\")}>Accept and join voyage</button><button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void act(\"decline\")}>Decline invitation</button></div>\r\n      </section>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\r\nimport { gmCan, requireGm } from \"@/lib/security\";\r\nimport { requirePlayerIdentity } from \"@/platform/auth\";\r\nimport { listPlayerLibrary } from \"@/platform/libraries\";\r\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\r\n\r\nexport async function GET() {\r\n  const [playerSession, staffSession] = await Promise.all([requirePlayerIdentity(), requireGm()]);\r\n  const player = playerSession ? await listPlayerLibrary(playerSession.playerProfileId) : null;\r\n  const captain = staffSession && gmCan(staffSession.user, \"CAPTAIN\");\r\n  const creator = staffSession && gmCan(staffSession.user, \"CREATE_TALES\");\r\n  const [waitingPlayers, recentDraft] = await Promise.all([\r\n    captain\r\n      ? db.playthroughMembership.count({\r\n          where: {\r\n            status: \"READY\",\r\n            playthrough: { previewMode: false, OR: [{ captainId: staffSession.userId }, { captainId: null }] },\r\n          },\r\n        })\r\n      : 0,\r\n    creator\r\n      ? db.tallTale.findFirst({\r\n          where: { creatorId: staffSession.userId, archivedAt: null },\r\n          orderBy: { updatedAt: \"desc\" },\r\n          select: { id: true, title: true },\r\n        })\r\n      : null,\r\n  ]);\r\n  const activePlayerCards = player ? [...player.groups.inProgress, ...player.groups.awaitingCaptain] : [];\r\n  return NextResponse.json({\r\n    player: playerSession\r\n      ? {\r\n          authenticated: true,\r\n          displayName: playerSession.player.displayName,\r\n          activeCount: activePlayerCards.length,\r\n          continue:\r\n            activePlayerCards.length === 1\r\n              ? { label: `Continue ${activePlayerCards[0].title}`, href: activePlayerCards[0].primaryHref }\r\n              : { label: \"Open My Tall Tale Library\", href: \"/player/library\" },\r\n        }\r\n      : { authenticated: false },\r\n    captain: captain\r\n      ? {\r\n          authenticated: true,\r\n          waitingPlayers,\r\n          continue: { label: \"Return to Captain's Command\", href: \"/captain/library\" },\r\n        }\r\n      : { authenticated: false },\r\n    creator: creator\r\n      ? {\r\n          authenticated: true,\r\n          recentDraft,\r\n          continue: recentDraft\r\n            ? { label: `Continue Editing ${recentDraft.title}`, href: `/studio/tales/${recentDraft.id}` }\r\n            : { label: \"Open Studio Library\", href: \"/studio/library\" },\r\n        }\r\n      : { authenticated: false },\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

\"Player sign-in failed.\");\r\n    router.push(\"/player/library\");\r\n    router.refresh();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function findInvitation(event: React.FormEvent) {\r\n    event.preventDefault();\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    setError(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/invitations/code\", {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ code }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; next?: string };\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"Invitation code not found.\");\r\n    router.push(body.next ?? \"/player/invitation\");\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"platform-auth player-auth-page\">\r\n      <div className=\"auth-ambient\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><i /><i /><i /></div>\r\n      <section className=\"auth-ledger\" aria-labelledby=\"player-sign-in-title\">\r\n        <Link href=\"/\">Return to role selection</Link>\r\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">Player waters</p>\r\n        <h1 id=\"player-sign-in-title\">Open your Tall Tale Library</h1>\r\n        <p>Sign in to continue remembered voyages, or enter the short code from a Captain&apos;s invitation.</p>\r\n        {authenticated && (\r\n          <Link className=\"brass-button auth-continue\" href=\"/player/library\">Continue to my library</Link>\r\n        )}\r\n        <div className=\"auth-columns\">\r\n          <form onSubmit={signIn}>\r\n            <h2>Player sign-in</h2>\r\n            <label><span>Player name</span><input autoComplete=\"username\" value={username} onChange={(event) => setUsername(event.target.value)} required /></label>\r\n            <label><span>Password</span><input type=\"password\" autoComplete=\"current-password\" value={password} onChange={(event) => setPassword(event.target.value)} required /></label>\r\n            <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>Open my library</button>\r\n          </form>\r\n          <form id=\"invitation-code\" onSubmit={findInvitation}>\r\n            <h2>Invitation code</h2>\r\n            <label><span>Short code</span><input inputMode=\"text\" autoCapitalize=\"characters\" placeholder=\"ABCD-EFGH\" value={code} onChange={(event) => setCode(event.target.value)} required /></label>\r\n            <p>Invitation links open the same ceremony automatically. Codes are checked securely and rate-limited.</p>\r\n            <button disabled={busy}>Find my invitation</button>\r\n          </form>\r\n        </div>\r\n        {error && <p className=\"platform-error\" role=\"alert\">{error}</p>}\r\n      </section>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\r\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\r\nimport { consumeRateLimit, rateLimitHeaders } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\r\nimport { hashToken } from \"@/lib/security\";\r\nimport { signInPlayer } from \"@/platform/auth\";\r\nimport { writePlatformAudit } from \"@/platform/audit\";\r\n\r\nconst schema = z.object({ username: z.string().trim().min(1).max(80), [REDACTED: SECRET ASSIGNMENT] });\r\n\r\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {\r\n  const parsed = schema.safeParse(await request.json().catch(() => null));\r\n  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Enter your Player name and password.\" }, { status: 400 });\r\n  const fingerprint = hashToken(`${request.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\") ?? \"local\"}:${parsed.data.username.toLowerCase()}`);\r\n  const rate = consumeRateLimit(`platform-player-login:${fingerprint}`, { limit: 6, windowMs: 15 * 60_000 });\r\n  if (!rate.allowed)\r\n    return NextResponse.json(\r\n      { error: \"Too many sign-in attempts. Wait before trying again.\" },\r\n      { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rate) },\r\n    );\r\n  const result = await signInPlayer(parsed.data.username, parsed.data.password);\r\n  await writePlatformAudit({\r\n    actorType: result ? \"PLAYER\" : \"ANONYMOUS\",\r\n    actorId: result?.player.id,\r\n    action: result ? \"PLAYER_SIGN_IN\" : \"PLAYER_SIGN_IN_FAILED\",\r\n    resourceType: \"PLAYER_PROFILE\",\r\n    resourceId: result?.player.id ?? fingerprint.slice(0, 12),\r\n    outcome: result ? \"SUCCEEDED\" : \"DENIED\",\r\n  });\r\n  if (!result) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Those Player credentials were not accepted.\" }, { status: 401 });\r\n  return NextResponse.json({\r\n    ok: true,\r\n    csrfToken: result.csrfToken,\r\n    player: { id: result.player.id, displayName: result.player.displayName },\r\n  });\r\n}\r\nimport { PlayerSignIn } from \"@/components/platform/PlayerSignIn\";\r\nimport { requirePlayerIdentity } from \"@/platform/auth\";\r\n\r\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\r\nexport default async function PlayerSignInPage() {\r\n  return <PlayerSignIn authenticated={Boolean(await requirePlayerIdentity())} />;\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

campaign = await db.campaign.findUnique({\r\n    where: { slug: \"development-forever-treasure\" },\r\n    include: {\r\n      chapters: true,\r\n      artifacts: true,\r\n      mapLocations: true,\r\n      mapRoutes: true,\r\n      sideQuests: true,\r\n      events: { orderBy: { sequence: \"asc\" } },\r\n      snapshots: true,\r\n      awards: true,\r\n      auditLogs: true,\r\n      saveStates: true,\r\n      playerAccesses: true,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  assert(campaign, \"the development campaign is missing\");\r\n  assert(campaign.chapters.length >= 5, \"the complete development chapter set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.artifacts.length >= 5, \"the complete development artifact set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.mapLocations.length >= 5, \"the complete development map set is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.mapRoutes.length >= 2, \"development route segments are required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.sideQuests.length >= 4, \"development side-quest states are required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.playerAccesses.length === 1, \"exactly one development player access is required\");\r\n  assert(campaign.currentSequence === campaign.events.length, \"campaign sequence must equal its ordered event count\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    campaign.events.every((event, index) => event.sequence === index + 1),\r\n    \"event sequences must be contiguous\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(\r\n    new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.sequence)).size === campaign.events.length,\r\n    \"event sequences must be unique\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(campaign.snapshots.length === campaign.events.length, \"every progression event must have a campaign snapshot\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    campaign.auditLogs.filter((entry) => entry.outcome === \"SUCCEEDED\" && entry.action !== \"DEVELOPMENT_SEED\").length >=\r\n      campaign.events.length,\r\n    \"every progression event must have a successful audit record\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(campaign.awards.length <= campaign.artifacts.length, \"artifact awards must remain unique\");\r\n  const studioTale = await db.tallTale.findUnique({\r\n    where: { slug: \"development-studio-voyage\" },\r\n    include: {\r\n      drafts: { orderBy: { revisionNumber: \"desc\" }, include: { chapters: { include: { blocks: true } } } },\r\n      versions: true,\r\n    },\r\n  });\r\n  assert(studioTale, \"the migrated Studio development tale is missing\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    acceptance ? studioTale.drafts.length >= 1 : studioTale.drafts.length === 1,\r\n    \"the migrated tale requires its initial editable draft\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(studioTale.versions.length === 1, \"the migrated tale requires one immutable published version\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    studioTale.latestPublishedVersionId === studioTale.versions[0].id,\r\n    \"the player catalog must point to the current version\",\r\n  );\r\n  assert(studioTale.drafts[0].chapters.length === 2, \"the migrated Studio draft requires two chapters\");\r\n  assert(\r\n    studioTale.drafts[0].chapters\r\n      .flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks)\r\n      .some((block) => block.blockType === \"taleComplete\"),\r\n    \"the migrated Studio draft requires a Tale Complete endpoint\",\r\n  );\r\n  const snapshot = JSON.parse(studioTale.versions[0].contentSnapshot) as {\r\n    schemaVersion?: number;\r\n    chapters?: unknown[];\r\n  };\r\n  assert(\r\n    snapshot.schemaVersion === 1 && Array.isArray(snapshot.chapters),\r\n    \"the published Studio snapshot must be schema-versioned\",\r\n  );\r\n\r\n  if (!acceptance && !preset) {\r\n    assert(campaign.currentSequence === 0, \"a fresh validation database must start at sequence zero\");\r\n    assert(campaign.chapters[0].state === \"LOCKED\", \"a fresh chapter must be locked\");\r\n  } else if (acceptance) {\r\n    const eventTypes = new Set(campaign.events.map((event) => event.type));\r\n    for (const expected of [\r\n      \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\r\n      \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\r\n      \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\r\n      \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\r\n      \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\r\n      \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\r\n      \"STATE_REVERTED\",\r\n    ]) {\r\n      assert(eventTypes.has(expected), `acceptance run did not record ${expected}`);\r\n    }\r\n    assert(campaign.awards.length >= 1, \"acceptance run must persist an artifact award\");\r\n    assert(\r\n      campaign.mapLocations.some((location) => location.revealedAt),\r\n      \"acceptance run must persist a released map location\",\r\n    );\r\n    assert(campaign.saveStates.length > 0, \"acceptance run must retain undo save states\");\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  console.log(\r\n    `Database verified: ${campaign.events.length} \"ASSET_MANAGE\";\r\n\r\nexport function authorizePlatform(principal: PlatformPrincipal, action: PlatformAction, resource: PlatformResource = {}) {\r\n  if (principal.kind === \"anonymous\") return null,\r\n      action: input.action,\r\n      resourceType: input.resourceType,\r\n      resourceId: input.resourceId,\r\n      outcome: input.outcome ?? \"SUCCEEDED\",\r\n      correlationId,\r\n is missing\");\n+  const snapshot = JSON.parse(version.contentSnapshot) as { chapters: Array<{ blocks: Array<{ id: string }> }> };\n+  const blockId = snapshot.chapters.flatMap((chapter) => chapter.blocks)[0]?.id;\n+  assert(blockId, \"the development version has no playable block\");\n+  if (await db.taleSession.findUnique({ where: { id: proofId } })) {\n+    console.log(\"Platform className=\"player-library platform-loading\"><p role=\"status\">Reading your voyage shelfâ€¦</p></main>;\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"player-library\">\r\n      <header className=\"platform-header\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">{library.player.displayName}&apos;s collection</p>\r\n          <h1>My Tall Tale Library</h1>\r\n          <p>Invitations, active adventures, and the exact historical editions you experienced.</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"library-truth\"><i /><span>Server confirmed</span><time dateTime={library.serverTime}>{new Date(library.serverTime).toLocaleTimeString()}</time></div>\r\n      </header>\r\n      <section className=\"library-tools\" aria-label=\"Search and filter Tall Tales\">\r\n        <label><span>Search</span><input type=\"search\" value={query} onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)} placeholder=\"Title, Captain, voyage, or year\" /></label>\r\n        <label><span>State</span><select value={filter} onChange={(event) => setFilter(event.target.value)}><option value=\"ALL\">All states</option>{groupLabels.map(([key, label]) => <option key={key} value={key}>{label}</option>)}</select></label>\r\n        <label><span>Sort</span><select value={sort} onChange={(event) => setSort(event.target.value)}><option value=\"RECENT\">Recently active</option><option value=\"TITLE\">Title</option><option value=\"COMPLETED\">Completion date</option></select></label>\r\n        <div className=\"view-toggle\" role=\"group\" aria-label=\"Library view\"><button className={view === \"gallery\" ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setView(\"gallery\")}>Gallery</button><button className={view === \"list\" ? \"active\" : \"\"} onClick={() => setView(\"list\")}>List</button></div>\r\n      </section>\r\n      {!library.total ? (\r\n        <section className=\"platform-empty\"><span aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</span><h2>Your shelf is waiting for its first voyage</h2><p>Open a Captain&apos;s invitation link, or enter the short code they shared with you.</p><Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/player/sign-in#invitation-code\">Enter invitation code</Link></section>\r\n      ) : !groups.length ? (\r\n        <section className=\"platform-empty\"><h2>No voyages match these filters</h2><button onClick={() => { setQuery(\"\"); setFilter(\"ALL\"); }}>Clear filters</button></section>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        groups.map((group) => (\r\n          <section className=\"library-group\" key={group.key} aria-labelledby={`group-${group.key}`}>\r\n            <header><div><p className=\"eyebrow\">{group.cards.length} {group.cards.length === 1 ? \"record\" : \"records\"}</p><h2 id={`group-${group.key}`}>{group.label}</h2><p>{group.description}</p></div></header>\r\n            <div className={`player-card-grid ${view}`}>\r\n              {group.cards.map((card) => <PlayerTaleCard card={card} key={card.id} />)}\r\n            </div>\r\n          </section>\r\n        ))\r\n      )}\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction PlayerTaleCard({ card }: { card: Card }) {\r\n  return (\r\n    <article className={`player-tale-card state-${card.state.toLocaleLowerCase()}`}>\r\n      <div className=\"tale-cover\">{card.coverUrl ? <img src={card.coverUrl} alt=\"\" /> : <span aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</span>}<b>{card.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</b></div>\r\n      <div className=\"tale-card-copy\">\r\n        <p className=\"card-kicker\">Version {card.versionLabel} Â· {card.voyageName}</p>\r\n        <h3>{card.title}</h3>\r\n        {card.subtitle && <h4>{card.subtitle}</h4>}\r\n        <p>{card.shortDescription ?? \"A Tall Tale waits inside this volume.\"}</p>\r\n        <dl>\r\n          <div><dt>Captain</dt><dd>{card.captainName}</dd></div>\r\n          {card.currentChapterTitle && <div><dt>Present chapter</dt><dd>{card.currentChapterTitle}</dd></div>}\r\n          {card.revealedChapterCount > 0 && <div><dt>Revealed chapters</dt><dd>{card.revealedChapterCount}</dd></div>}\r\n          {card.completionDate && <div><dt>Completed</dt><dd>{new Date(card.completionDate).toLocaleDateString()}</dd></div>}\r\n          {card.completionDate && <div><dt>Memories</dt><dd>{card.memoriesCollected}</dd></div>}\r\n          {card.plannedStartAt && <div><dt>Planned start</dt><dd>{new Date(card.plannedStartAt).toLocaleString()}</dd></div>}\r\n        </dl>\r\n        <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={card.primaryHref}>{card.primaryLabel}</Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </article>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

readPendingInvitationToken();\r\n  if (!credential) return false;\r\n  const where = credential.startsWith(\"code:\")\r\n    ? { shortCodeHash: hashToken(credential.slice(5)) }\r\n    : { tokenHash: hashToken(credential) };\r\n  return Boolean(\r\n    await db.invitation.findFirst({ where: { id: invitationId, ...where }, select: { id: true } }),\r\n  );\r\n}\r\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\r\nimport { apiError } from \"@/tall-tale/api\";\r\nimport { getTaleSessionState, interactWithTaleSession } from \"@/tall-tale/progression\";\r\nimport { consumeRateLimit, string }> }) {\r\n  try {\r\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\r\n    const access = await authorizeTaleSessionPlayer(sessionId);\r\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\r\n    return NextResponse.json(\r\n      await getTaleSessionState(sessionId, access.kind === \"legacy\" ? access.token : undefined, false, access.kind === \"identity\"),\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (cause) {\r\n    return apiError(cause);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function POST(request: Request, context: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\r\n  try {\r\n    const { sessionId } = await context.params;\r\n    const access = await authorizeTaleSessionPlayer(sessionId);\r\n    if (!access) return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Voyage session required.\" }, { status: 401 });\r\n    const rate = consumeRateLimit(`tale-player:${sessionId}`, { limit: 45, windowMs: 60_000 });\r\n    if (!rate.allowed)\r\n      return NextResponse.json(\r\n        { error: \"Too many voyage actions. Wait a moment before trying again.\" },\r\n        { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rate) },\r\n      );\r\n    return NextResponse.json(\r\n      await interactWithTaleSession(\r\n        sessionId,\r\n        access.kind === \"legacy\" ? access.token : undefined,\r\n        await request.json(),\r\n        access.kind === \"identity\",\r\n      ),\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (cause) {\r\n    return apiError(cause);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

\"The voyage state could not be read.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      setState(body);\r\n      setError(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n  }, [sessionId]);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => {\r\n      setNow(Date.now());\r\n      void load();\r\n    });\r\n    const source = new EventSource(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}/events`);\r\n    source.onopen = () => setConnected(true);\r\n    source.onerror = () => setConnected(false);\r\n    source.addEventListener(\"progression\", () => void load());\r\n    const timer = setInterval(() => setNow(Date.now()), 500);\r\n    return () => {\r\n      source.close();\r\n      clearInterval(timer);\r\n    };\r\n  }, [load, sessionId]);\r\n  const waitRemaining = useMemo(\r\n    () => Math.max(0, Date.parse(state?.pendingVerification?.expiresAt ?? \"\") - now),\r\n    [now, state],\r\n  );\r\n  async function act(action: \"continue\" | \"confirm\" | \"answer\" | \"choice\" | \"timer\", extra: JsonObject = {}) {\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    setError(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/play/sessions/${sessionId}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action, idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(), answer, ...extra }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { state?: State; accepted?: boolean; error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The story could not advance.\");\r\n    else if (body.state) {\r\n      setState(body.state);\r\n      if (body.accepted) setAnswer(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n  }\r\n  if (!state)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"player-runtime loading\">\r\n        <p role=\"status\">{error || \"Finding the current mark on the chartâ€¦\"}</p>\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  const choices =\r\n    state.block?.blockType === \"choice\" && Array.isArray(state.block.configuration.choices)\r\n      ? (state.block.configuration.choices as Array<Record<string, unknown>>)\r\n      : [];\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className={`player-runtime ${state.session.previewMode ? \"preview-mode\" : \"\"}`}>\r\n      <header>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">\r\n            {state.session.previewMode ? \"Preview Mode â€” no real progress\" : (state.chapter?.title ?? \"Tall Tale\")}\r\n          </p>\r\n          <h1>{state.tale.title}</h1>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className={`runtime-connection ${connected ? \"connected\" : \"reconnecting\"}`}>\r\n          <i />\r\n          {connected ? \"Captain channel connected\" : \"Reconnecting to canonical state\"}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </header>\r\n      <section className=\"runtime-stage\">\r\n        {state.block ? (\r\n          <PublishedBlockView block={state.block} assets={state.assets} />\r\n        ) : (\r\n          <article className=\"runtime-block unknown-block\">\r\n            <h2>No safe story block is available.</h2>\r\n          </article>\r\n        )}\r\n        <div className=\"runtime-actions\" aria-live=\"polite\">\r\n          {state.session.status === \"COMPLETED\" ? (\r\n            <>\r\n              <strong>This Tall Tale is complete.</strong>\r\n              <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/play/${state.tale.slug}/history`}>\r\n                View voyage history\r\n              </Link>\r\n              <Link href=\"/tales\">Choose another tale</Link>\r\nimport { PlayerRuntime } from \"@/components/tales/PlayerRuntime\";\r\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\r\nexport default async function SessionPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ sessionId: string }> }) {\r\n  return <PlayerRuntime sessionId={(await params).sessionId} />;\r\n}\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

\"The library preference could not be saved.\");\n+    setLibrary((current) => {\n+      if (!current) return current;\n+      const update = (cards: Card[]) =>\n+        cards\n+          .filter((item) => action !== \"hide\" || item.id !== card.id)\n+          .map((item) => (item.id === card.id ? { ...item, pinned: action === \"pin\" } : item));\n+      return {\n+        ...current,\n+        total: action === \"hide\" ? current.total - 1 : current.total,\n+        groups: Object.fromEntries(\n+          Object.entries(current.groups).map(([key, cards]) => [key, update(cards)]),\n+        ) as Library[\"groups\"],\n+      };\n+    });\n+  }\n@@\n-              {group.cards.map((card) => <PlayerTaleCard card={card} key={card.id} />)}\n+              {group.cards.map((card) => <PlayerTaleCard card={card} key={card.id} onPreference={setPreference} />)}\n@@\n-function PlayerTaleCard({ card }: { card: Card }) {\n+function PlayerTaleCard({ card, onPreference }: { card: Card; onPreference: (card: Card, action: \"pin\" | \"unpin\" | \"hide\") => void }) {\n@@\n-        <p className=\"card-kicker\">Version {card.versionLabel} · {card.voyageName}</p>\n+        <p className=\"card-kicker\">Version {card.versionLabel} · {card.voyageName}{card.pinned ? \" · Pinned\" : \"\"}</p>\n@@\n-        <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={card.primaryHref}>{card.primaryLabel}</Link>\n+        <div className=\"card-actions\"><Link className=\"brass-button\" href={card.primaryHref}>{card.primaryLabel}</Link><button onClick={() => onPreference(card, card.pinned ? \"unpin\" : \"pin\")}>{card.pinned ? \"Unpin\" : \"Pin to top\"}</button>{[\"COMPLETED\", \"EXPIRED_REVOKED\"].includes(card.state) && <button onClick={() => onPreference(card, \"hide\")}>Hide from library</button>}</div>\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

## Tool Result: call_6HcdLakAitBxE0dgZFGvW6rT

[{"text": "Script failed\nWall time 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\n", "type": "input_text"}, {"text": "Script error:\nExit code: 1\nWall time: 0.4 seconds\nOutput:\n# Tall Tale Platform implementation record\r\n\r\nStatus: implementation in progress  \r\nSpecification: `Tall_Tale_Platform_Codex_Implementation_Specification.pdf`  \r\nRepository baseline: `main` at `d0906e2`, synchronized with `origin/main` on 2026-07-17\r\n\r\n## Repository inventory before implementation\r\n\r\nThe current application already provides two additive but connected domains:\r\n\r\n- The original `Campaign` companion supports password-only Player access, the Quartermaster/Game Master command center, ordered progression events, presence, server-side public projections, CSRF-protected Captain mutations, audit records, and sanitized SSE.\r\n- Tall Tale Studio Phase 1 provides `TallTale`, editable `TaleDraft` graphs, immutable checksummed `PublishedTaleVersion` snapshots, version-pinned `TaleSession` runtime records, ordered idempotent session events, authorized media variants, Creator validation/publishing, Captain session controls, helper verification, and Player runtime pages.\r\n\r\nCurrent primary routes are `/`, `/tale/[campaignSlug]`, `/quartermaster`, `/tales`, `/play/[taleSlug]`, `/play/[taleSlug]/session/[sessionId]`, `/captain`, and `/studio`. Existing GM credentials and server-side sessions are shared by Captain and Creator capabilities. Existing Tall Tale Player sessions use an opaque random token whose hash is persisted and whose clear value is stored only in an HttpOnly cookie, but they do not yet provide a durable Player identity, library, invitation lifecycle, or multi-playthrough history selector.\r\n\r\n## Architecture decision\r\n\r\nThe platform implementation will extend the existing domain rather than introduce a disconnected replacement:\r\n\r\n- `TallTale` remains the authored identity.\r\n- `PublishedTaleVersion` remains the immutable release and historical rendering source.\r\n- `TaleSession` becomes the persisted playthrough aggregate. Existing preview-session behavior remains isolated through `previewMode`; every real new playthrough must reference one published version.\r\n- New Player profile/session, membership, invitation, invitation-event, reveal-state, scoped-role, and platform-audit records provide identity, library access, invitation lifecycle, revocation, and traceability.\r\n- Existing `GameMasterUser` credentials remain the strong account authority. Scoped role assignments supplement existing capability checks without invalidating current Captain/Creator logins.\r\n- Workspace-specific services return explicit Player-safe, Captain, and Creator view models. Raw Prisma entities and complete published snapshots are never serialized to Player library or invitation clients.\r\n- Existing `/tales`, `/play/[taleSlug]`, and `/captain` paths receive safe compatibility behavior while `/player/*`, `/join/*`, `/captain/library`, `/captain/invitations`, and `/studio/library` become the canonical platform families.\r\n\r\n## Migration and compatibility risks\r\n\r\n1. Existing `TaleSession` rows may already be active or completed. The migration must preserve their identifiers, access-token hashes, version binding, state, event order, inventory, variables, and timestamps.\r\n2. Legacy sessions do not have a durable Player profile or membership. Backfill must create deterministic guest profiles and memberships without changing their current runtime cookie behavior.\r\n3. Existing status values start at `ACTIVE`; new setup and invitation states must be accepted without breaking the progression engine, which may mutate only `ACTIVE` or `PAUSED` sessions and must keep `COMPLETED` terminal.\r\n4. Existing GM role/capability behavior must remain functional while explicit Captain and Creator denial is enforced on every new route and API.\r\n5. Published asset responses currently authorize by version identity. Player requests must additionally prove membership/session access and reveal scope; public-safe cover variants require a narrowly defined exception.\r\n6. SQLite is the supported local and test database, while a MySQL-parity migration must be maintained. The migration is additive and rollback is backup/restore plus application rollback; destructive down-migrations are not automated.\r\n7. The repository is public. Seeded accounts, invitations, story copy, names, PINs, and media remain fictional development data only.\r\n\r\n## Vertical implementation slices\r\n\r\n1. Add additive schema/migrations, domain state machines, authorization policies, token hashing, backfill, and development fixtures.\r\n2. Add secure Player session/sign-in, invitation resolution/acceptance/decline, library projection, waiting room, archive projection, and protected asset policy.\r\n3. Add Captain library, atomic playthrough/invitation creation, secure link/QR/short-code delivery, lifecycle management, launch synchronization, and audit history.\r\n4. Add the three-role cinematic gateway, role-aware sign-in and workspace switching, responsive Player/Captain screens, reduced-motion behavior, and compatibility redirects.\r\n5. Complete version comparison, restore/fork ancestry, immutable-release guards, authorization/concurrency tests, full role-journey browser coverage, migration validation, and documentation.\r\n\r\n## Completion evidence\r\n\r\nThis section will be updated after implementation with migration results, automated test counts, manual desktop/mobile checks, authorization probes, historical-version proof, remaining production risks, and exact Git state.\r\n\r\nName                                                          Length\r\n----                                                          ------\r\n.gitignore                                                       684\r\nForever_Treasure_Cinematic_Animation_Codex_Prompt.pdf         991085\r\nREADME.md                                                       3166\r\nTall_Tale_Platform_Codex_Implementation_Specification.pdf     571011\r\nTall_Tale_Platform_Implementation_Record.md                     5338\r\nTall_Tale_Studio_Phase_1_Codex_Implementation_Prompt.pdf      599225\r\nvision_waypoint_external_ar_governing_specification_v1_0.pdf 1022751\r\n# The Forever Treasure Companion\r\n\r\nProduction-oriented foundation and fully automated local demo for a private nautical-fantasy date-night Tall Tale. All committed story material is generic development seed content; no final surprise content belongs in this public repository.\r\n\r\n## Current phase\r\n\r\nThe cinematic companion now also includes Tall Tale Studio Phase 1: an authenticated no-code authoring workspace, reusable asset/location/artifact libraries, immutable publishing, a dynamic player catalog, version-pinned live sessions, and Captain controls. A shared animation director still coordinates the original harbor, journal, chart, artifact, and finale experience without allowing presentation timing to outrun server truth. All committed content remains fictional development seed material.\r\n\r\nThe Phase 3 feature branch adds an expanded Game Master Command Center: 12 URL-backed workspaces, truthful presence/synchronization, sanitized Player View, nonmutating projection, staging, idempotent commands, stale-tab protection, recovery, audit/diagnostics, keyboard controls, and tablet/emergency layouts. It remains unintegrated until the parallel Phase 2 reconciliation pass.\r\n\r\n## Stack\r\n\r\n- Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, strict TypeScript\r\n- Prisma 6.19 with SQLite for local/test and an equivalent MySQL production schema\r\n- GSAP 3.15 for orchestrated scenes and SVG/text work; Motion 12 for React interaction and presence\r\n- StPageFlip for the journal; local Rive and Lottie runtimes with explicit static fallbacks\r\n- bcrypt password/access-code hashing, server-side database sessions, CSRF tokens, and rate limiting\r\n- Vitest and Playwright\r\n\r\n## Reproducible setup\r\n\r\nRequirements: Windows PowerShell 5.1+, Node.js 24, npm 11, and Git. MySQL 8 is only required for production parity; the supported local/demo/test strategy is SQLite.\r\n\r\n### Fastest Windows demo\r\n\r\nAfter cloning, double-click `Start Forever Treasure Dev.cmd`, or run:\r\n\r\n```powershell\r\nnpm run dev:full\r\n```\r\n\r\nThe launcher creates an ignored `.env` when absent, installs the exact lockfile, generates Prisma, applies migrations, creates generic development data only when the voyage is missing, starts the app, checks health, and prints the URLs and credentials. Existing campaign progress is preserved across normal stop/start cycles. Network/UNC workspaces are mirrored to an ignored local runtime under `%LOCALAPPDATA%` because Node and SQLite are unreliable on network shares. Stop it with `npm run dev:stop`.\r\n\r\n- Player: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/tale/development-forever-treasure`\r\n- Tall Tale catalog: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/tales`\r\n- Player phrase: `development-moonwake`\r\n- GM: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/quartermaster`\r\n- Studio: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/studio`\r\n- Captain: `http://127.0.0.1:3000/captain`\r\n- GM development[REDACTED: LOGIN CREDENTIAL]\r\n\r\nThese values are disposable local defaults, never production credentials. To opt into LAN access, run `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-dev.ps1 -Lan`; Windows Firewall and network policy still determine whether another device can connect.\r\n\r\n### Portable manual setup\r\n\r\n```bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/Kgray44/treasurehuntSoT.git\r\ncd treasurehuntSoT\r\nnpm ci\r\ncp .env.example .env\r\nnpm run db:generate\r\nnpm run db:migrate\r\nnpm run db:seed\r\nnpm run dev\r\n```\r\n\r\nSet unique local values in `.env`; the seed’s fallback values are development-only and must never be used outside an isolated development database. Player path: `/tale/development-forever-treasure`. GM path: `/quartermaster`.\r\n\r\n## Commands\r\n\r\n| Command                                   | Purpose                                                               |\r\n| ----------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |\r\n| `npm run dev:full`                        | Idempotent setup, migration, progress-safe seed check, and server     |\r\n| `npm run dev:stop`                        | Safely stop only the recorded development process                     |\r\n| `npm run validate`                        | Fresh DB, format/lint/types/unit/E2E/a11y/build/restart proof         |\r\n| `npm run dev`                             | Next.js only; assumes setup is already complete                       |\r\n| `npm run build`                           | Production build                                                      |\r\n| `npm start`                               | Start production build                                                |\r\n| `npm test`                                | Domain, command-center, Studio, animation, and component unit tests   |\r\n| `npm run assets:validate`                 | Validate local Lottie/Rive contracts and fallback paths               |\r\n| `npm run test:e2e`                        | Cross-browser player, Command Center, Studio, and animation workflows |\r\n| `npm run db:migrate`                      | Apply local SQLite migrations                                         |\r\n| `npm run db:seed`                         | Load replaceable development content                                  |\r\n| `npm run db:preset -- mid-voyage`         | Reset to a repeatable development-only companion preset               |\r\n| `npm run db:generate:mysql`               | Generate production MySQL client                                      |\r\n| `npm run db:migrate:mysql:command-center` | Apply the Phase 3 production MySQL migration                          |\r\n| `npm run db:migrate:mysql:studio`         | Apply the production-parity Tall Tale Studio migration                |\r\n\r\nFull setup, validation stages, output locations, clean-clone instructions, and troubleshooting are in [local development](docs/local-development.md) and [testing](docs/testing.md). Studio architecture and operations are in [Tall Tale Studio](docs/tall-tale-studio.md); the future recognition seam is in [vision helper boundary](docs/future-vision-helper.md). Animation ownership, scene contracts, assets, performance, and the development lab are indexed from [animation architecture](docs/animation/architecture.md).\r\n\r\n## Repository workflow\r\n\r\n`main` is canonical. At task start: fetch, inspect status/remotes, and pull with rebase when clean. At task end: validate, review the complete diff, commit intentionally, fetch/rebase if needed, push without force, and verify local `HEAD` equals `origin/main`. See [Codex handoff](docs/codex-handoff.md).\r\n\r\n## Important limitations\r\n\r\nThe full story, final Rive artwork/audio, horizontal scale-out for SSE, and production deployment are later work. The current sound is restrained and procedural. The sole third-party visual sample is MIT-licensed, local, documented, and development-only; production uses original SVG/CSS fallbacks. The repository is public, so only generic development content is permitted. See [known limitations](docs/known-limitations.md).\r\n\r\n## Next steps\r\n\r\nAdd CI for the complete validation gate, exercise the parallel MySQL schema in an integration environment, and replace process-local SSE fan-out before multi-instance deployment. Real surprise content remains blocked until repository visibility is verified private.\r\n\r\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

                  \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\security.md                                   \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\ships-log.md                                  \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\side-quest-system.md                          \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\story-state-machine.md                        \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\tall-tale-studio.md                           \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\testing.md                                    \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\theatrical-event-system.md                    \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\unseen-content.md                             \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\voyage-chart.md                               \r\nC:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\docs\\animation\\architecture.md
